clean_body: There is too much at stake for us to fall behind and with 3 more days until our most important deadline on 6/31, we are counting on you. Hi Peter, I will keep this quick: Moms in Office is falling short of our quarterly fundraising goal and we are counting on you to help us close the gap before our most important deadline on Wednesday. We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign. Missing these critical fundraising benchmarks means falling short of our efforts to recruit and support more women in 2022. = There is too much at stake to fall behind at this stage of the cycle. Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. We are the only women's organization helping to pay for childcare on the campaign trail. Our PAC made a significant investment by establishing a Childcare Fund that our candidates can use to pay for their caregiving expenses. = Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms and to pass the kind of legislation that working moms and families alike need in our country today. Thank you! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office | I will chip in to pay for childcare! = = = = = | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . subject: POLL: Do you still support Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Peter,
Despite the Democrats doing everything in their power to reverse all our America First progress - Republican voters still believe in President Trump and the job he did Making America Great Again!

Take a look at a few of President Trump's wins, Peter:
1. Strengthened our military
2. Rebuilt of economy
3. Fortified our border
4. Held China accountable
5. Protected our Second Amendment rights
6. Lowered our taxes

President Trump WON for America, but now we need to hear from YOU. [**Do you still support President Trump?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57824165:JGycpDlcN:m:1:3253819041:E2B21AAD0F6B19061741EF953E3B390E:r)

[**Let us know where you stand right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57824165:JGycpDlcN:m:1:3253819041:E2B21AAD0F6B19061741EF953E3B390E:r)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Legally required
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
The next few days, my team and I will be reaching out to you about our upcoming FEC fundraising deadline. Can I have a minute to explain why?
On Wednesday, we will close the books on the last quarter of our fundraising and we have set a goal of reaching 25,000 donations by then.
And here’s the thing, We are legally required to report this number — and we need it to be strong. That’s why it’s so important we reach this goal, because the more people who donate, the better we can show the strength behind our movement.
We are keeping the pressure on the Senate to pass universal background checks but the work we do requires a lot of resources. And a large majority of those resources come in response to emails just like this.
**So before I go any further, please allow me to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 25,000 donation June FEC fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21&amount=3&refcode=em210628-1-15?t=1&refcode2=272_3935704_NIy-mf&akid=272%2E3935704%2ENIy-mf)

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: All I can say is “wow”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The rest of the country –– and the world –– are seeing the power of the Hoosier spirit in full force right now. [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=eb24dfce33d741d49e6ae3abaec1481b&_e=rbBWw43h4yiMvyBLFkQH0gWLWKqq6VQ5uuHLX-FJunUyNBfnb1Uw3Bx7ohPzDJ4CSwcrpXkhRer799zIS7Dk8PqWMTEaUND3CH2SSVcoxqkNemfXtp-R3DadQsjndl3p7xSsvQM763aD2gvzOw94hP7KhamKHvZrIGR18F-dCcUz4kaqs1uE-RjU5MeJJOXcFIKFG4UoeQ61m_hgb-SFpY-_P6r3kkBy49tiA00lJp4Oy8oyWTCBxG8eKeDT-Rl3H6lSs__hmtUuFet0SGbRhzS0gtLZI7oTp79xaEtYootRfuNCWNH2eRYtCC5Qb5fCLB6kUF6K1ky1gPfhNvXt5FNg1CgRRNbSW-AUsAIPchJpDp-943tY19SMWABfROqGSWg7gYwCwjND5ep6DfIw0b7BBt83_70xp762O4ldPHTUdJ36krzMrLZXVMca43UmfI4zy1gckBo1wt9lcOQhdfJ8cTWKgtzqt2n-o01C8XA%3D) Friend, This week marks the end of the first half of 2021 –– and the start of the second half of what’s already turned out to be a record-setting year for Indiana. _All I can say is_** _“wow.”_** Economic investment and job creation numbers are through the roof. Our rebounding economy can barely keep up with the current pace of the growth we’re seeing, and _that’s a GREAT problem to have as we put this pandemic in the rearview and move forward._ **I’m proud of all that we’ve accomplished together in these past six months, and I know that we can do even**** _greater_****things in the next six months if we keep our foot on the gas.** The rest of the country –– and the world –– are seeing the power of the Hoosier spirit in full force right now. I’ve never been more ready to lead the way with forward-thinking, common sense conservative solutions, **but I’m going to need your help.** [**Please, join me in continuing to build One Indiana for ALL by pitching in any amount before our upcoming End of Quarter deadline at 11:59PM on June 30th.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=eb24dfce33d741d49e6ae3abaec1481b&_e=rbBWw43h4yiMvyBLFkQH0gWLWKqq6VQ5uuHLX-FJunUyNBfnb1Uw3Bx7ohPzDJ4CSwcrpXkhRer799zIS7Dk8PqWMTEaUND3CH2SSVcoxqkNemfXtp-R3DadQsjndl3p7xSsvQM763aD2gvzOw94hP7KhamKHvZrIGR18F-dCcUz4kaqs1uE-RjU5MeJJOXcFIKFG4UoeQ61m_hgb-SFpY-_P6r3kkBy49tiA00lJp4Oy8oyWTCBxG8eKeDT-Rl3H6lSs__hmtUuFet0SGbRh_j0ZM7ShTkLH2_K8TX9lMkUGklA-HG0_J-LUUSAam6ZzARq1vmWC0E8F0K4p8e_8Xj4z6OH7oEnyDh58a6ym3_YsvRfzgBo6UFdT2ZRRPuPKgu3KeHRKiLfePtshABJoAYuGQdNRHPzRGqtoshh0umUV0MRgFDrlsvwL1fVucLOJ6dTOnmcHbdHC3R-gnrXjle_jS8QKyzFrohxD4wDTB0%3D) [**PITCH IN: BUILD ONE INDIANA FOR ALL**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=eb24dfce33d741d49e6ae3abaec1481b&_e=rbBWw43h4yiMvyBLFkQH0gWLWKqq6VQ5uuHLX-FJunUyNBfnb1Uw3Bx7ohPzDJ4CSwcrpXkhRer799zIS7Dk8PqWMTEaUND3CH2SSVcoxqkNemfXtp-R3DadQsjndl3p7xSsvQM763aD2gvzOw94hP7KhamKHvZrIGR18F-dCcUz4kaqs1uE-RjU5MeJJOXcFIKFG4UoeQ61m_hgb-SFpY-_P6r3kkBy49tiA00lJp4Oy8oyWTCBxG8eKeDT-Rl3H6lSs__hmtUuFet0SGbRh95FloL1OlywAay9ZIzwt3y9bJbwOEFXFjoECZL8vnQjk-aHaBbqjgZJ5sVhPbENbL-WhXSfVwhvtMUh9FFaJrkd6yP0puhMZJzXywu6N9J7xko--qxNsQop1r6yVOjIWpSrzxfSvXR8_4xTh5wPCUjEZifxliQl71L0Uhy9S3SJICYYvSkDVpWJbz2-HQOXmc8wuxFsvAeqzGaDIlMUN5w%3D) Thank you for all your support, Eric Holcomb |

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Hi Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
| Peter,

I’m reaching out today because I need your help. Susan Wild’s critical FEC End of Quarter fundraising deadline is approaching rapidly and she needs your support.

[_**Peter, it would mean a lot to me if you could make a donation to Susan’s campaign before her upcoming deadline. Will you chip in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31550886/293018282/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210628-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTQzNTY2My00OGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QSZANLbke2Lf8PG8HAGl7lva0WlWwuNPHgXvZd5tlc=)

I can tell you firsthand, Susan is the kind of person we need in Congress. She is willing to put in the hard work to pass meaningful progress and get things done that will directly benefit hard-working Americans.

But I’m concerned because Susan’s district is one of the most vulnerable in the entire country. If Republicans win here, they will be on track to winning back the entire House of Representatives. We have worked way too hard the past two years to let that happen.

[_**I’m counting on you today, Peter. body:
We've arrived at a pivotal moment ahead of next year. | |
---
| | [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=891cd6c727&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| |
I’ll keep this brief: our next End of Quarter fundraising deadline is on Wednesday.

I met with the finance team this morning, and they’ve told me we need to raise another $7,500 to reach our quarterly goal. [**Can you help? Pitch in $15 — or even just $5 — here.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=8b6051144b&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| [DONATE HERE »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=71a9ea4de7&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE HERE »")
---
| When I ran for the U.S. Senate, I promised Kansans and Americans that I would **_always_** stand strong for our values, our jobs, our faith, and for life.

And that’s exactly what I’ve done — from defending election security to standing up to H.R. 1 / S. 1 to putting forward solutions to end the Biden Border Crisis. **In fact, one liberal outlet just said that I’m the most conservative senator in America.**
---
| [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=39bd7e827f&e=0b94e583bc)
---
|
---
| **These End of Quarter deadlines — and this is my second since coming to the Senate — are key tests of where our momentum stands.**

If we don’t reach our goal, Democrats and their media allies will say there’s no support for our conservative agenda. They’ll say the American people are totally bought into the radical liberal policies of the Democrats.

**I’m not buying that — I think Kansans and Americans know that Joe Biden’s first five months have been a disaster. And this is no time to sit on the sidelines.**

[**Stopping their agenda means taking a unified stand, now. Will you join me? Chip in $15 or even just $5 here.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=948e9fdcc2&e=0b94e583bc)

[](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=34ca1502b9&e=0b94e583bc)
Senator Roger Marshall
---
| [DONATE HERE »](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=147de108f5&e=0b94e583bc "DONATE HERE »")
---
| P.S. — I’m fighting every day in the U.S. Senate in Washington and defend our Kansas values, but I can’t do it alone. Every dollar donated, petition signed, and video shared makes a huge difference. [**Please consider pitching in here.**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=205c840416&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=a400d5f705&e=0b94e583bc)
---
| Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=0799cdc67c&e=0b94e583bc&c=f7f74a2221).

body:
You wouldn’t trust an arsonist to make policy about fire prevention
#

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations=2C=20Roza=20Calderon?=
subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Cerissa A. Brown for Mayor of Birmingham, Alabama
body:
A Vision for Birmingham that works for all, not the few! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8fa1a991d0&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
### **Cerissa A. Brown is a Future Generations Candidate!**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=bf88f07aed&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| **Cerissa A. Brown** is a mental health activist and advocate for the unhoused, a working-class mother and neighbor, who wants Birmingham to be a just and prosperous city that allows its citizens to thrive. Unfortunately, Birmingham is only working for a select few, while others are left behind.

Across the 99 neighborhoods that make up Birmingham, Alabama, upward mobility is rare, businesses are closing their doors, people are being squeezed out of their homes, and real estate developers are moving in. Cerissa's activism began while seeking solutions for her community, but her desperate calls to Mayor Randall Woodfin went unanswered — it is then _she knew she had to run_.

Cerissa wasn't the only one being ignored by Woodfin. In fact, the Birmingham branches of progressive organizations **[Our Revolution](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=01f584c791&e=66979298f9)** and **[Democratic Socialists of America(DSA)](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=76d86b3477&e=66979298f9)** **_rescinded their endorsement and formally condemned Mayor Randall Woodfin for turning his back on the priorities of Birmingham residents._**
---
| _Cerissa has been fighting for her community - always searching for solutions to the city's problems in homelessness and mental health. Trying to find ways to end food deserts, and supports Congresswoman Cori Bush's Green New Deal for Cities Act of 2021._
_**She will be a Mayor who listens and doesn't get cozy with special interests.**_

---
| [DONATE TO CERISSA!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=09bc6132cd&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO CERISSA!")
---
|
---
| WOODFIN'S REPORT CARD: The last thing we need is someone using the progressive movement to advance their personal political ambitions. Join us in sending Mayor Woodfin a clear message - **your seat is not safe!**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=cfb76758f3&e=66979298f9)
---
Birmingham - DSA formally condemns Mayor Woodfin after keeping close tabs on his broken campaign promises.
[ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=cdddc19eab&e=66979298f9)
---
Our Revolution - Birmingham formally rescinds their endorsement of Mayor Woodfin on January 29th, 2021, ahead of his reelection bid.
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Join Cerissa this week of action in
Birmingham, Alabama.**
---
|
---
| We are proud to have Cerissa be our first endorsement in Alabama. Cerissa is a no-gimmicks candidate who has the courage to campaign on environmental justice, increasing access to mental health services, and addressing neighbors' homelessness, all for Birmingham because she is running on the issues that matter and impact her community directly.

We've seen that given a great progressive candidate to vote for, we can build enthusiasm and we can win and WIN BIG! We have built a nationwide coalition with organizations like Our Revolution, Sunrise Movement, Youth Climate Strike, MoveOn, and Flip the West to build our progressive bench!

We can do the same for Cerissa in Birmingham and can continue to expand in some of the most critical races in Alabama as we did in Texas in 2020, and again this June by [electing Junior Ezeonu, the _first progressive to Grand Prairie City Council!_ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0608c05a29&e=66979298f9)

We can only win with your support. **[Will you split a donation with Cerissa and Future Generations?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=47381b549a&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [GIVE $7](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=94482a2132&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $7")
---
| [GIVE $20.21](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3fb0d5a3cf&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $20.21")
---
| [GIVE OTHER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=acd01f67a6&e=66979298f9 "GIVE OTHER")
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ad4be6b7bd&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8b00734463&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1ff3b68e30&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8765741b7f&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Future Generations PACPO BOX 362PALO PINTO, TX 76484
[Add us to your address book](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=0e7142e5e1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=0e7142e5e1).

name: John Kasich
subject: It's working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Our hard work is making a difference. Can't you feel it? I know that I do and I'm asking you to help keep up this fight for America's future. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=bf370e3b4e93466f98bfe0496de1a8ae&_e=YQm7NisB49oK9NUy8wqKNxfmFacEnAK9g5RBVaJ72XFHT5gg41GVqANhyovbM5GwLY9E_ppHembGo66VncVuCsvwpSQ1-zY2Q6a6Cwm0BU4lpMQ0wR-v8CWQGo6NenWyWN52wBvv1TARURFyPzMbvCk2ZSc2tg7t25ro6DHDbiXNgghY5_xfnzqMjs1flVsQbP5mUB53DG3QIk8imZRfiyqdksWYKq7eWYhP8diIqx30ymWmpuQGg3GvJbSfdEmMnuX7YG4wgoxoAgiJ-91KNQ%3D%3D) Peter - did you see the news last week? President Biden and five Senators from each party stood in front of the White House and announced that they'd reached a bipartisan compromise on an infrastructure bill for America. It has a long way to go in Congress and the Democrats have already signaled that they plan to play politics, but what a refreshing moment to see that bipartisan announcement. It feels like it's been ages since this happened! Our hard work is making a difference. Can't you feel it? I know that I do and I'm asking you to help keep up this fight for America's future. Our kids and grandchildren are counting on us to fix what's so broken in D.C. [**We have an important fundraising deadline this Wednesday**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=bf370e3b4e93466f98bfe0496de1a8ae&_e=YQm7NisB49oK9NUy8wqKN8qF_PvgkhJK3eKRGCbMRPlk2AyYVdYJ07kW2iNHHPWmAZeaRlhO3jIDBwaMX99buvmWnfkdSJ1sxUJORfmVSAQRRXWlV1-dWQQ2aaqp68j2dlh-GfazbDdKdTXTQBiR9peSK8fToo4uFOp1y47bqlIquLanBnoAuXPIsyvcJIjF7XfrKfJ7ziti7e99XchnQmmZ5qVdQgdEa6ckH3WThMVe4DaVmFDAb0atd-zkbwT_6hQbuF4LeBTGjkTUGzhFgw%3D%3D) and could use your help to keep up the momentum. The funds we raise go directly into the advocacy activities that are rallying support for these bipartisan actions for our country. [Will you consider chipping in right now to help hit our June fundraising goal?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=bf370e3b4e93466f98bfe0496de1a8ae&_e=YQm7NisB49oK9NUy8wqKN8qF_PvgkhJK3eKRGCbMRPlk2AyYVdYJ07kW2iNHHPWm0TSp9YQE1w1yREC80CO4dcNOabpWU0g8XqkkJrrH6xe1yIE6PnA5t6CU0R5tvNfKDDiPRSmzf7utOpcGFlpr-FRsy3YHe1Mrt0FvNVxGMGP1IJxf74gsUKQyCjGn6O8GOSjxDLuOPXlFCAOAr6-ZtciFvowUFeFkGcWh4em_3Sy_YsKRqBWBUihsPA-JE0AVUSfQcxuzSwmHmVQF3nHlFA%3D%3D) [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=bf370e3b4e93466f98bfe0496de1a8ae&_e=YQm7NisB49oK9NUy8wqKN8qF_PvgkhJK3eKRGCbMRPlk2AyYVdYJ07kW2iNHHPWmad63Q3lELmFWpB-kvFUQVeNvTkNpRnunJjjaHv6zQvFOtT1TaqZOkFLZD9p0asFGDM8EzkFCq_hWboLL4dFkrBGTcx2aE8cS7ySRXnpLbyy3m4Z_G_81cOg9PSCgJk4dWOBxerRetKDUI36tUs6mCAFU6iYvot6_pEDVaM9a5UeG2mwC6jhLwCyUh3BYuaR7ztCgLZdz273ZHyPAQQ6OKA%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country and restore our Republican Party to a coalition formed around ideas for the future. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Something I’m incredibly proud of
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

$3 before midnight.

That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to contribute ahead of our
critical June FEC fundraising deadline on Wednesday.

I know that our team has sent a few emails about this deadline in recent
days — and for good reason. We are legally mandated to report our
fundraising numbers and we have to put up a strong showing.

And the fact is that the vast majority of the money we raise to fuel this
grassroots campaign comes from lots and lots of folks like you making
small-dollar contributions when they can.

That’s a fact I’m incredibly proud of — but it also means from time to
time I have to directly ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210628-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]Can you please add a contribution of $3 to our grassroots
campaign before Wednesday’s public FEC deadline? We’re still a bit short
of our 2,500 contribution goal and your support is essential if we’re
going to get there.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=1014&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=1016&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=1017&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=1018&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=1019&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]Other amount

Our fight to reform the immigration system, tackle climate change by
passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable
health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful
interests who want to stop us.

But that’s okay because I believe this team is ready to put in the work
during the tough fights ahead.

And I am so thankful to know we’re in this together.

Thank you in advance for chipping in!

Warmly,

—Alex

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?source=em210628-1-15&t=1020&refcode2=120_159979_1ttt16&akid=120%2E159979%2E1ttt16 ]DONATE NOW

name: Mark Kelly
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I have an important ask to make ahead of our critical June FEC fundraising deadline on Wednesday. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.
On Wednesday, we are legally required to report our fundraising numbers for the last quarter and we have to put up a strong showing. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._
**This week, One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC just dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**
We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal by Wednesday.
That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better...a team of people who I know will always have my back.
**And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&amount=3&refcode=em210628-1-15?t=1&refcode2=866_6688874_e5oxq6&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=14&refcode2=866_6688874_e5oxq6&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=15&refcode2=866_6688874_e5oxq6&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=16&refcode2=866_6688874_e5oxq6&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=17&refcode2=866_6688874_e5oxq6&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=18&refcode2=866_6688874_e5oxq6&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210628-1-15&t=19&refcode2=866_6688874_e5oxq6&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6)**
---
****
As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond.
Thank you for all that you do,
—Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=20&akid=866%2E6688874%2Ee5oxq6).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

subject: BREAKING: CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
CNN: “TRUMP’S HOLD ON THE REPUBLICAN PARTY WILL LIKELY PAVE HIS WAY FORWARD TO THE 2024 NOMINATION” I have never come to you with a more important ask. First, Trump said he’d run for president if we lost the House. Now, CNN just reported that if Trump DOES run for president, he is almost certain to win the nomination. I REFUSE to let him be anything more than a one-term president. I need a historic response -- 3,000 gifts before midnight -- to protect my Democrats and upend Trump’s plans. Can I count on your $15 to keep the majority firmly in Democrats’ hands and make sure Trump never runs for office again? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210604_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15] I need you to make a crucial choice right now. -- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans and steal our Majority... -- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump he will NEVER take the House from us The only thing stopping another disastrous Trump presidency is Democrats winning the House. I will fight with everything I have -- but I can’t do it alone. Can I count on your $15 before midnight?Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $15>> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in another amount now >> [] Thank you, Nancy Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? DONATE [] SHOP [ isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: . | Peter,
Last week, I grilled Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin about divisive teachings and policies being put in place by the US Military.
It was sad to see his display of ignorance about what is really going on right under his nose.
Lessons from Critical Race Theory are being taught to our soldiers while they are spied on for signs of "extremism." And we all know what that means - they are looking for Trump supporters and others who believe in our America First movement.
---
| | | [PROTECT OUR TROOPS FROM THE WOKE MOB](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hbi1Bw1v-7GX_lcFTaiZLkcKyx0qYZJJPEwnqOiHMeVtaCq5M0kduUDmAGGdFbcQhaCo6M67czvG006pZG_YYrizejIv0EtnuhriH_Rr9GkqQDgbzvnJT5K2hUcK0XG14cJs9PvAUNZUQPJNXuWWphCXiwctwgql7zVJzFNhArQ64b8JQQN3b8K0MAKg7JgT&c=t4SRUE85gvKDMMfBvytFS9oqbr210I_NERROUsQh0SJeblvbEr2g8w==&ch=wOntmIf1sCI0pGfikRy-xphfx9if3lV_49vsfeO_cQq7tDMwfaIJ6g==)

---
| The men and women of our military are not pawns in some Marxist social experiment. They are the greatest fighting force the world has ever seen, and we must ensure they're not subjected to divisive policies that would weaken cohesion and authority.
Space Force Lt. Co. Matthew Lohmeier, who was fired from his post for opposing Critical Race Theory, could be the first of many "purgings" of conservative thought in the military.
I need you to join me in standing up to the woke mob trying to take control of the US Military and protecting the men and women that defend our freedom every day.
---
| | | [DON'T LET THE MOB TAKE OVER THE MILITARY.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hbi1Bw1v-7GX_lcFTaiZLkcKyx0qYZJJPEwnqOiHMeVtaCq5M0kduUDmAGGdFbcQhaCo6M67czvG006pZG_YYrizejIv0EtnuhriH_Rr9GkqQDgbzvnJT5K2hUcK0XG14cJs9PvAUNZUQPJNXuWWphCXiwctwgql7zVJzFNhArQ64b8JQQN3b8K0MAKg7JgT&c=t4SRUE85gvKDMMfBvytFS9oqbr210I_NERROUsQh0SJeblvbEr2g8w==&ch=wOntmIf1sCI0pGfikRy-xphfx9if3lV_49vsfeO_cQq7tDMwfaIJ6g==)

| Thanks for your concern about this important issue.
-Matt Gaetz

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Are you with me?
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c263%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=7c4eZ2efu%2blWtGMVK1PqjQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4614%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fuXFrT%2feejyLgVnm8JlTTA&sysid=1) Fellow American, Over the past few decades, the Left has plotted -- and largely succeeded -- in taking over our nation’s most sacred institutions. _Today, anti-America forces control what students learn in our nation’s schools, what students see on TV and social media, what they read in newspapers and hear about the world, and so much more. _ The last year has compounded this toxic reality and shaken our nation to its core. Between the coronavirus, ANTIFA mobs destroying our cities, the controversial 2020 election, corrupt government, oppressive big tech, and “woke” cancel culture -- the need to win America’s Culture War is more urgent now than ever. **_It’s time we reclaim OUR COUNTRY!_** **[At Turning Point USA, my team and I are reclaiming our nation from radical forces who hate America, hate our values, and hate anyone who dares to stand up to them. Will you help us reach our goal of raising $100,000 by the Fourth of July with your donation today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4625%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zhbPTO3Cfjczhx16AjKoSA&sysid=1)** [**Yes, I want to reclaim America!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4626%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J0LUFn9kwTVCtf5mPMZJ8A&sysid=1) Turning Point USA (TPUSA) is committed to exposing the Radical Left and repudiating its ideological dream of turning American into a socialist country. Last year, we sent undercover reporters into Antifa-occupied areas such as the infamous Seattle “CHAZ” and discredited the lies that have provoked Left-wing mobs to bring violence to our streets. TPUSA documented how Chinese Communists allowed COVID-19 to spread globally through their incompetence and deception. We also expanded our movement of young people committed to defeating The Swamp and reclaiming our country by surpassing 2,500 high school and college campus chapters all across America. **And we generated more than 5.3 billion impressions on our viral, hard-hitting digital content to cut through the toxic lies of the Left with our social media engine -- one of the largest in the country. ** **[We have a clear path to reclaim our country and win America’s Culture War, but only if we have the support of Real Americans -- patriots just like YOU who make our work possible at TPUSA.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4627%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s7LlOQmCP9IZihHPR%2bF3ug&sysid=1)** The next few years will be an all-out war between **PATRIOTIC TRUTHS** vs. the Left’s EMPIRE OF LIES. **But even in the age of cancel culture and fake news, no one can silence the collective voice of Real Americans -- like you and me -- when we come together to take on the Radical Left.** TPUSA is driving the country’s most forceful and systematic effort to make our kids love America again through our highly effective on-campus and online programs, but we must act quickly to protect the America we love and bring her back from the Leftist-driven brink of disaster. **[Now is the time to play offense with a sense of urgency and WIN America’s Culture War. clean_body: Fellow American, Over the past few decades, the Left has plotted -- and largely succeeded -- in taking over our nation’s most sacred institutions. Today, anti-America forces control what students learn in our nation’s schools, what students see on TV and social media, what they read in newspapers and hear about the world, and so much more. The last year has compounded this toxic reality and shaken our nation to its core. Between the coronavirus, ANTIFA mobs destroying our cities, the controversial 2020 election, corrupt government, oppressive big tech, and “woke” cancel culture -- the need to win America’s Culture War is more urgent now than ever. It’s time we reclaim OUR COUNTRY! Turning Point USA (TPUSA) is committed to exposing the Radical Left and repudiating its ideological dream of turning American into a socialist country. Last year, we sent undercover reporters into Antifa-occupied areas such as the infamous Seattle “CHAZ” and discredited the lies that have provoked Left-wing mobs to bring violence to our streets. TPUSA documented how Chinese Communists allowed COVID-19 to spread globally through their incompetence and deception. We also expanded our movement of young people committed to defeating The Swamp and reclaiming our country by surpassing 2,500 high school and college campus chapters all across America. And we generated more than 5.3 billion impressions on our viral, hard-hitting digital content to cut through the toxic lies of the Left with our social media engine -- one of the largest in the country. The next few years will be an all-out war between PATRIOTIC TRUTHS vs. the Left’s EMPIRE OF LIES. But even in the age of cancel culture and fake news, no one can silence the collective voice of Real Americans -- like you and me -- when we come together to take on the Radical Left. subject: Judicial Watch Sues HHS for Information on Covid-19 and Illegal Immigration
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for COVID-19 technical guidance provided to the Office of Refugee Resettlement relating to illegal aliens released by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and U.S. Customs and Border Patrol

---|---|---

clean_body: They know I’m the only Pro-Trump conservative in this race. | Peter, While we surge ahead in the polls, the establishment is absolutely terrified of me... As a Navy SEAL, a strong conservative and the only pro-Trump candidate in the race, these RINOs know I’m the clear FRONTRUNNER for this OPEN seat that will decide the fate of the 50-50 Senate. I fully expected attacks from the liberal Fake News media, Kamala and Soros -- but now I’m being attacked by the radical Left and fake “Republicans” alike! Which is why I’m counting on grassroots patriots like YOU to help me crush our end-of-quarter fundraising goal with the next FEC-mandated deadline just hours away. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Fellow Conservative,

I know you have better things to be doing than reading about a congressional race a full 1.5 years before Election Day, but for me, **talking, writing, and emailing about this race is currently my life.** It’s all consuming, and I wouldn’t have it any other way.

Last year, I came within 5 percentage points of defeating one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress. And quite frankly, it was because of conservatives like YOU. The kind words of encouragement helped get us through campaigning during a pandemic; **[the generous donations enabled us to outspend my opponent and attract the support from the national Republican Party.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=28e455ec60b14b0380dff175d054adda&_e=Cwc8j97aUL6Fvne1xAcpVZ7jrvFIDslbuXqzo8jOzMg6VW3gdPG7OTzmroHwqbMeoESpK5hLpNi2DxDJZVPm0INUS9NZMFtttAvFgm71pg4WRazcwV5TikZiMuhjzBfhfWfVLvH1xeCBefDm3_SAvYy5uJE9qnVXHydCUzeDCX2Km1UMkaonMgiMBpRbNqfvIHa2dFqO7C2DAIhzX06K7ZliuUag0GFfEzLjydyQAAs-p5r1JcIw900K-MdDTioFqDmJY_ZKOMmEdG-V8gkK3CD5ZsSWCjLhFXsMvCZVkqA7VRqPeHZ9m1fmXTCzx3r8cGxQsmpmCSbfFi-jTDSXExUTEuNF4F9rZAT0YmglrIYdP5GBoWvmeyRi5cmR5m0BIdVg21D54Y1Ft_UIuDoqScD0XeDtcpoRB9l_qjVeR62Iyg8EcspkJRdnJggqOW_z)**

The NRCC (National Republican Campaign Committee) has their eyes on me once again. With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, they’re already identifying potential top races to invest in. **My race in Oregon’s 4th District is one they’re looking at seriously.**

**But as I’ve written to you before, I have to prove that I can raise $100,000 online before they’ll formally begin to advise and invest in my campaign.**

**We’ve set an internal deadline of reaching this goal by midnight on June 30th - JUST 48 hours NOW.** **[We’re currently sitting at 95% of our goal raised, and we need your IMMEDIATE HELP to make sure that the last 5% doesn’t elude us.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=28e455ec60b14b0380dff175d054adda&_e=Cwc8j97aUL6Fvne1xAcpVZ7jrvFIDslbuXqzo8jOzMg6VW3gdPG7OTzmroHwqbMeoESpK5hLpNi2DxDJZVPm0INUS9NZMFtttAvFgm71pg4WRazcwV5TikZiMuhjzBfhfWfVLvH1xeCBefDm3_SAvYy5uJE9qnVXHydCUzeDCX2Km1UMkaonMgiMBpRbNqfvIHa2dFqO7C2DAIhzX06K7ZliuUag0GFfEzLjydyQAAtTFV0FTulgygnv9JED8JIQcMmOTfr4JDJdD9qE4kyiwvwckjl_T8u9s3C6BGBVYXEyvJ7AsD2GP3Mkdi3uEl8ku-9c_QqeJOK0Kcs66gTH0N5JWaehNv4pRBhgMr8vFtxiV63DHKt4wHZnLI1357HMOEU9-Tz9z1hASk7bsKXO5NujjkkjxN3FHoQwUA1-IZzmudEM4FKa4uSaPisljbkI)**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=28e455ec60b14b0380dff175d054adda&_e=Cwc8j97aUL6Fvne1xAcpVZ7jrvFIDslbuXqzo8jOzMg6VW3gdPG7OTzmroHwqbMeoESpK5hLpNi2DxDJZVPm0INUS9NZMFtttAvFgm71pg4WRazcwV5TikZiMuhjzBfhfWfVLvH1xeCBefDm3_SAvYy5uJE9qnVXHydCUzeDCX2Km1UMkaonMgiMBpRbNqfvIHa2dFqO7C2DAIhzX06K7ZliuUag0GFfEzLjydyQAAufzYp46hjKcBNaGXWanxXGscZe9DazxxmE0lj3DB41RffXp25TcBTrr3t0eOJz4FAN8BvEZSeXOjft6Mmsgh8FZcrhF0ZNxgcMpXMefEeA8EXxnZVJie7miNLXPq1iiyFltK8pwWlR09MrRsLgjMrxry3ErEIqY0eU3NHDYnhafpN00IFpPyUk6TyBya8uDgQq9avZoWhL2l61-RezjlAX)
I’m running again because I know that with a full year and a half of campaigning - introducing myself to voters I couldn’t last time due to COVID-19 restrictions - **we will take out Peter DeFazio and with our victory help deliver the House a Republican majority.**

Thanks for your help. **[Any amount helps.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=28e455ec60b14b0380dff175d054adda&_e=Cwc8j97aUL6Fvne1xAcpVZ7jrvFIDslbuXqzo8jOzMg6VW3gdPG7OTzmroHwqbMeoESpK5hLpNi2DxDJZVPm0INUS9NZMFtttAvFgm71pg4WRazcwV5TikZiMuhjzBfhfWfVLvH1xeCBefDm3_SAvYy5uJE9qnVXHydCUzeDCX2Km1UMkaonMgiMBpRbNqfvIHa2dFqO7C2DAIhzX06K7ZliuUag0GFfEzLjydyQAAu7Deo98qVEHaUkmggofmmLYmc7vIgeQPqbofw0TM5sbdsaI44yT63KNQxj-nxsX3idTPFn7FTi4-rqL5UH0zH4uECjTiIqB_Z2mAz2Y4DRv_wbLh7MiQsSqYMQfPpCdWvb0Zud6Jn8HsuA5KANdCLsujLGczeszFywLxWplLMmuVRoKwmcFVCziI8kGm-jsJKOONYu6OImeqEK_X_LRM9u)**

And quite frankly, it was because of conservatives like YOU. The kind words of encouragement helped get us through campaigning during a pandemic; The NRCC (National Republican Campaign Committee) has their eyes on me once again. With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, they’re already identifying potential top races to invest in. My race in Oregon’s 4th District is one they’re looking at seriously. But as I’ve written to you before, I have to prove that I can raise $100,000 online before they’ll formally begin to advise and invest in my campaign. We’ve set an internal deadline of reaching this goal by midnight on June 30th - JUST 48 hours NOW. I’m running again because I know that with a full year and a half of campaigning - introducing myself to voters I couldn’t last time due to COVID-19 restrictions - we will take out Peter DeFazio and with our victory help deliver the House a Republican majority. Thanks for your help. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Cole Muzio
subject: New name...same fight
body:
**_God’s Word and God’s People are under attack. Georgia is the Frontline of this battle. WE are the Frontline._** It has been a great honor to lead Family Policy Alliance of Georgia as its President and Executive Director since its launch in early 2017. God has blessed us with unmatched results and incredible growth. Now, it’s time to take the next step forward. **That is why I am proud to announce our relaunch as****FRONTLINE POLICY COUNCIL****– Georgia’s premier force for Faith, Family, and Freedom in the Peach State.** As you know, Georgia is the epicenter of every national, political, and cultural discussion. Those opposed to our values are well-funded, well-organized, and committed to a complete, radical takeover. We are ready to be the Frontline of the fight equipping Christians to engage effectively – defending families and advancing freedom. **Take action today by helping us launch this new organization with a major impact.[Your donation of $50, $100, $250, or greater will be MATCHED dollar for dollar up to $30,000!](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/1uwHwYKlMNtjhlmTjXCYeA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRivIlYP0QcaHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tL1cDc3BjQgpg1HgE2mDf3kpFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Georgia’s future is on the line. There is a major push to undermine Scripture, silence people of faith, cancel Churches and conservatives, and erode the family. Nowhere is this battle more intense than our state. The timing of our launch could not be more important. Since 2017 when we were started by the national Family Policy Alliance, our efforts have been the tip of the spear in our state, but, as our organization has grown and the needs of our state have increased, it has become clear that our mission would be best served by relaunching Family Policy Alliance of Georgia as an independent organization – one capable of meeting the challenges facing the Peach State. [**But we need your help. We are raising the resources to do more for families – and more to advance the Christian faith in the public square – than any initiative our state has ever seen.****Stand with us TODAY and your donation will be DOUBLED!**](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/1uwHwYKlMNtjhlmTjXCYeA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRivIlYP0QcaHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tL1cDc3BjQgpg1HgE2mDf3kpFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) We are the Frontline fighting for God’s craftsmanship, for LIFE, and for His Design. We are the Frontline fighting against the Stacey Abrams machine and the mob that want to lie about our state and undermine our elections. We are the Frontline fighting against those who want to make our schools and our churches “woke” instead of truthful and God-honoring. We are the Frontline – serving God’s Church to Defend Families and Advance Freedom across Georgia. [**And, yes, we are battle-tested and prepared for victory.****Please support our efforts as the Frontline with a $50, $100, $250, or greater gift TODAY!**](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/1uwHwYKlMNtjhlmTjXCYeA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRivIlYP0QcaHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tL1cDc3BjQgpg1HgE2mDf3kpFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) We are now a 100% Georgia operated entity and the strongest champion for biblical values in a state that is increasingly under attack. This transition reflects a return to the original vision of Focus on the Family and Dr. James Dobson for independent state organizations, rather than “chapters” under a national one. _So, what difference does this transition make?_ While we are already the largest pro-life, pro-family effort in the state, this transition allows us to do more to increase our resources devoted to this fight. It also means:
* A larger Georgia team, doing more across our state to equip the Church to stand for our values
* Investment in best-in-class advocacy tools to help you impact your elected officials more than ever before
* New programs aimed at educating Christians on what God’s Word says and how to get involved
* New programs and curriculum for churches across our state
* More policy resources and an increased legislative agenda to help fight against radical and dangerous ideologies like CRT, champion the unborn, protect medical freedom, religious freedom, and free speech, promote educational opportunity, defend election integrity, Save Girls Sports and thwart the radical LGBTQ+ sexual indoctrination agenda, and MORE! (**_We’re committed to having the most potent lobbying force at the Capitol – going toe to toe with leftist groups as well as special interests like the Chamber, Big Education, and Big Medicine!)_**
* More training and tools for God-honoring legislators
* Greater communications – and new tools – aimed at persuading fellow believers, reaching them with Truth, and advancing the Gospel in the public square
* _And more..._

**We have a BIG vision. Because of an incredible group of supporters, we have become Georgia’s largest and most significant force for families. Yet, we must grow to compete against the agenda that seeks to take over Georgia.**[**PLEASE join us in this fight and your gift will be matched up to $30,000!**](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/1uwHwYKlMNtjhlmTjXCYeA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRivIlYP0QcaHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tL1cDc3BjQgpg1HgE2mDf3kpFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Frontline Policy Council is here to stay. We are a Georgia organization with a track record of success, a heritage dating back to Focus on the Family, and a national network of state-based allies around the country and nationally-focused friends supporting our work. We are the organization that can – and will – get the job done. For my family and me, it has been an incredible journey launching and seeing God use Family Policy Alliance of Georgia. We are grateful for the national organization starting us up. However, as they go in a different direction, and we agree on a need for an independent Georgia effort (our network of state-based organizations around the country have long been mostly independent, and soon, all will be as Family Policy Alliance shifts directions), this is a next step that we are SO excited to take. **My wife, Spencer, myself, our staff at Frontline, our board, and all our stakeholders are honored to be on the battlefield for Georgia. There is MUCH work to do, but we are committed to victory and to His glory.** **On the Frontline,** Cole Muzio President & Executive Director **P.S. We are working to expand and make the impact needed for our state under attack. Help Frontline Policy Council as we invest more in Georgia than ever before – battling on the Frontline.**[**Help us match your gift dollar for dollar by making a generous donation – whatever the Lord calls you to give – TODAY!**](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/1uwHwYKlMNtjhlmTjXCYeA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRivIlYP0QcaHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tL1cDc3BjQgpg1HgE2mDf3kpFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) | |
---
_Your gift allows us to be the leading force in the state for faith, family, and freedom_
[Donate](http://link.quorum.us/f/a/1uwHwYKlMNtjhlmTjXCYeA~~/AACYXwA~/RgRivIlYP0QcaHR0cHM6Ly9mcm9udGxpbmVwb2xpY3kuY29tL1cDc3BjQgpg1HgE2mDf3kpFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

name: Team NHGOP
subject: Granite State Republican Independence Day Celebrations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
Join NH Republicans in local, patriotic events to celebrate July 4th!

**Celebrate America's Independence Day all weekend long by attending these patriotic displays organized by the NHGOP & local Republican committees - Hope to see you there!**
_This listing is not definitive, and other town committees might plan their own events in __addition. If you're unsure of your county/town, reach out to your local committee chair to confirm_ _! _
**Got questions? Email questions to : info@NHGOP.org**

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: One year ago, today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
I felt safe. No one knew who I was. Then, the Fascist Black Lives Matter mob changed everything in one evening. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=bab70a075a134f3283f1d0246790c02c&_e=-SRZLeR7TVwj41oSqvedOhfVuNswji7hh2RGJB27lmNv42Yqy9Ywshwv_VzOZ8rbTmc0Jv3fVRqx4CSL6zAujVtbWhxUXCVEISKqHSyl9CGePv5BboFdhajCLq1SLIgMp9Mi2_Ysn7e5kbfe-XFm5np0t-0H6-XzLOYT6CtPYUQQaDFkonUKBYsDxCkVxehw2tCDbo-ZyoGwZPsbhj1s740_7cOuJR6ZN2QlG802ERX4FKYN5MIEI5Ka0oPPdXyiRTC3Ivq0gtdg3wpPTvAkok5A2cDEGqKDgdDiyeNkDqtTCP_CiE7oc_-V_CLw0r9XmXiAHMte72UpzD8kpjKat3V_lLbbEy2T92ZLRaqHP8J4APKhiAfNWv4RXtaHKrOYaFKPPOSK_5-ktGcAT3KcrBhzvdAvBip9Z4L99vFWFNbovJm_GYO-M5l-EbIMdKtxedFV_2JLlCKNfXVyIrLFMA%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

On this day in 2020, the fascist Black Lives Matter mob marched on St. Louis, through my neighborhood, through my front gate and into my yard.

[](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=bab70a075a134f3283f1d0246790c02c&_e=-SRZLeR7TVwj41oSqvedOhfVuNswji7hh2RGJB27lmNv42Yqy9Ywshwv_VzOZ8rbTmc0Jv3fVRqx4CSL6zAujVtbWhxUXCVEISKqHSyl9CGePv5BboFdhajCLq1SLIgMp9Mi2_Ysn7e5kbfe-XFm5np0t-0H6-XzLOYT6CtPYUQQaDFkonUKBYsDxCkVxehw2tCDbo-ZyoGwZPsbhj1s740_7cOuJR6ZN2QlG802ERX4FKYN5MIEI5Ka0oPPdXyi7W48GSK3m__eL47hgo8dq_tAkkv4nGbuXupPvllMoqW-RX84c1zUZN9fuXXqPwNcWEBhWRHNq3JrDpQEnakQ_I8tKQYXI_bOqmALbpiMUWIBSCsm6z8Gcdso-A44SnZed7Ew6Dy4Fz8DA4IYx7NnNKppPSE2oIl4cIlvZQw-yYswK2ATuqByM2VXG4jn8PajFgeLOlyUd4Sy91mlu0YHCA%3D%3D)
_THIS PICTURE WAS TAKEN ONE YEAR AGO TODAY_
While my wife and I were enjoying a quiet evening at home, **the mob had other plans for us**. We took to arms and walked onto our front lawn to defend our home, like many of you reading this email would have done. If you live in a city like me, you’ve felt change over the last year. **We’re not as safe as we once were**. Homeless encampments are popping up in places they’d never been before; and going out to dinner means that you have to prepare to be heckled by protestors seeking racial reparations.

It’s ludicrous.

One year ago today:
* No one knew my name
* The government hadn’t confiscated my guns
* I wasn’t running for the United States Senate
* I felt safe

The fascist BLM thrust me into the spotlight and gave me a platform on which to stand, speak to the masses, and fight for the country which has given me so much.

I don’t have much time today, so I need to ask you for your help before this email gets too lengthy.

**In a little less than 48 hours my team and I will be facing the first Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline since I declared my candidacy last month. We need to make sure that we’re able to show my opponents we mean business, which in terms of political campaigns means showing we raised a lot of cash.**

[ MAKE A GIFT
HELP ME REACH MY QUARTERLY GOAL »](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=bab70a075a134f3283f1d0246790c02c&_e=-SRZLeR7TVwj41oSqvedOhfVuNswji7hh2RGJB27lmNv42Yqy9Ywshwv_VzOZ8rbTmc0Jv3fVRqx4CSL6zAujVtbWhxUXCVEISKqHSyl9CGePv5BboFdhajCLq1SLIgMp9Mi2_Ysn7e5kbfe-XFm5np0t-0H6-XzLOYT6CtPYUQQaDFkonUKBYsDxCkVxehw2tCDbo-ZyoGwZPsbhj1s740_7cOuJR6ZN2QlG802ERX4FKYN5MIEI5Ka0oPPdXyiL7PqZTdmc9AuTO_dHVj-4RFQwyzDamsGtdTIKQEwQaqg8gnP5NBKXGqyMdhfcCmWPgWhef1rYUcABurxx5m5DH8KECdov-k-_fhDjJlJtc47k0qeMHTBeYIbz_KSoxhyJnZ2TG9VCOuJxos5e45CmGBBdQxMHPZue_X_IWvNgvRZjFpJlkcUsbsCThgPn8jQNb1ClJ3VcV9Gi7_5KtFfRg%3D%3D)
The only way my opponents are going to take my candidacy seriously is if we put up numbers they can’t compete with. We’ve raised about 85% of the funds we set to raise, and **[I’m asking you to chip-in $100, $50, $25 or even just $5 right now to help us reach our goal by Wednesday evening.](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=bab70a075a134f3283f1d0246790c02c&_e=-SRZLeR7TVwj41oSqvedOhfVuNswji7hh2RGJB27lmNv42Yqy9Ywshwv_VzOZ8rbTmc0Jv3fVRqx4CSL6zAujVtbWhxUXCVEISKqHSyl9CGePv5BboFdhajCLq1SLIgMp9Mi2_Ysn7e5kbfe-XFm5np0t-0H6-XzLOYT6CtPYUQQaDFkonUKBYsDxCkVxehw2tCDbo-ZyoGwZPsbhj1s740_7cOuJR6ZN2QlG802ERX4FKYN5MIEI5Ka0oPPdXyicKHxDC4hZ9Okdj-lk9oaj4NdFIb3Ekqnss5_4EQ1LQoEu8Qr3Ows-DdkeF0T5HCUtvRIvbtSFyIcUu3aQtnsoEJN0749iVADkXPggbsnT5MaEtgDnqwZqWIHqjhPW3Pddl6NAfaen8NNqb8dLyjwoUC90iNm0Lys0eS_wFB1XfC2bZ5BNrcKPTTnluYvE5t8b2dovxR2vOTB76N9A2SUWQ%3D%3D)**

If we don’t meet our quarterly fundraising goal, well, that would be a shame.

We need a United States Senator who will stand up to the mob on streets and the mob of Democrat Socialists in the Senate. This country is too great to let the likes of Bernie Sanders to take her down from within.

**[$5, $10, even $50 is all I’m asking of you today. It really does make a difference to this campaign.](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=bab70a075a134f3283f1d0246790c02c&_e=-SRZLeR7TVwj41oSqvedOhfVuNswji7hh2RGJB27lmNv42Yqy9Ywshwv_VzOZ8rbTmc0Jv3fVRqx4CSL6zAujVtbWhxUXCVEISKqHSyl9CGePv5BboFdhajCLq1SLIgMp9Mi2_Ysn7e5kbfe-XFm5np0t-0H6-XzLOYT6CtPYUQQaDFkonUKBYsDxCkVxehw2tCDbo-ZyoGwZPsbhj1s740_7cOuJR6ZN2QlG802ERX4FKYN5MIEI5Ka0oPPdXyirGnyuaNJej0Xwn5KMjC_ZH8vzCzPDoFL5KmwSZXec_Rk347WTG6vZMN1CLPmGC7kT8gfmsmVFSYKt_TBonwGuAlsjwrKPpb2DS7G5vGuQHFYs6h1JTwRLxfkfzuJaKvlFSa18RON11u1iGJ81T5rjnPlhNwtMSN_BMMHsZ2FdpFvZBhA5dbV-cIp61QXhtzHAah97CaDXzyYF6DL124F0w%3D%3D)**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Here's what we saw on file next to your name, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The finance team and I were looking through our donation records when we saw your name.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210628-1868-header&t=1&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)
Peter,
We're less than 76 hours away from our *biggest* fundraising deadline of the campaign thus far — **the end of the first full fundraising quarter since John entered the race.**
In preparation for this crucial deadline, John and Gisele asked me to compile a list of online donors. They're calling folks to personally say thanks for your support. The finance team and I were looking through our donation records when we saw your name.
Here's what I pulled from the records we've got on file: 👇
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21346?refcode=em20210628-1868&t=2&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)**
---
The reason I'm showing you this today is because, in just two days, John is required by federal law to publicly report exactly how much we've raised to the FEC.
**All eyes will be on our campaign — especially now because of the latest poll that dropped that shows John is the *only* Democrat in this race who can reliably win in every Republican matchup.**
We're going to need every penny of support we can get ahead of Wednesday's Q2 deadline in order to fend off GOP attacks and elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate, so I've gotta ask:
[**Peter, will you donate your very first $5 before Wednesday's end-of-quarter deadline? John and Gisele have agreed to call a few grassroots donors who chip in before this big milestone, so don't miss your chance to hear directly from him today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21346?refcode=em20210628-1868&t=3&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21346?refcode=em20210628-1868&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)**
Thanks so much for your support. We can win if enough people on this team choose to step up in important moments like this one. John truly appreciates every single donation — big or small.
Thank you!
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. We're also still quite a bit short of our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal. **John knows how important it is for us to meet this big goal, so he's personally agreed to call a few of yinz who donate before Wednesday's deadline.**[**Chip in $5 right now, and John and Gisele might just call you to say thanks!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/21346?refcode=em20210628-1868&t=23&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210628-1868-footer&t=24&refcode2=1868_434096_qXMfdo&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1868%2E434096%2EqXMfdo)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

We can win if enough people on this team choose to step up in important moments like this one. John truly appreciates every single donation — big or small. Thank you! Eric Eric Stern Deputy Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate P.S. We're also still quite a bit short of our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal. John knows how important it is for us to meet this big goal, so he's personally agreed to call a few of yinz who donate before Wednesday's deadline. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
But time is definitely not up yet! Can you help us in the final stretch!?

Hi Peter,
**The end of Q2 is closing in and I need your help meeting my fundraising goals and staying on track to win! **[**Can you chip in $27 today and become one of the thousands of small-dollar donors who make up this grassroots campaign? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31560712/293040499/-1874959920?refcode=06-28&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwNjYwNS01OGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ggboTsVNM2s_9VO6PoszIlLeHoOoalNzO7CTP5yUJg=)
See, when you run for public office, you report all of your fundraising numbers at the end of every fiscal quarter. These numbers are then analyzed by all sorts of interested folks: the media, potential donors, and even opponents.
**We raised more than $110,000 in Q1 of 2021! Can you help me show other supporters (and the competition) that this race has the support it needs to go for the long haul?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31560714/293040501/-1874959920?refcode=06-28&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwNjYwNS01OGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ggboTsVNM2s_9VO6PoszIlLeHoOoalNzO7CTP5yUJg=)
It’s not just about the money: the number of donors helps, too. Lots of small-dollar donors put corporate-funded candidates on notice. Big corporations can buy billboards, but billboards don’t vote, and a whole bunch of regular folks invested in a campaign?
Those folks vote.
**We’ve seen this momentum building across the country. Folks just like you are sick and tired of the status quo. They’re tired of waiting for civil rights to be granted to all of their neighbors. They’re tired of hearing about tiny little reductions in emissions standards while the temperatures soar. They’re tired of reading yet another horror story about someone dying because they couldn’t get basic medical care or a simple medicine that they needed to live.**
**[I’m ready to fight for all these things and more, from the High Desert to Washington, D.C. Can you join me with a $27 donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31560716/293040503/-1874959920?refcode=06-28&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwNjYwNS01OGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ggboTsVNM2s_9VO6PoszIlLeHoOoalNzO7CTP5yUJg=)**
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for Congress, CA-08

name: Nick Freitas
subject: VA: out of work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
Friend, It only took **six months** for Joe Biden to ruin the economy, incentivize people to stay on unemployment instead of working, and endanger the future of our children’s education. _If I wasn’t so ticked off, I’d say I was impressed._ But I’m mad, Friend. I’m mad because America deserves better. I’m mad because _Virginia_ deserves better than the destructive socialist policies Richmond Democrats are so keen on pushing into our communities. Virginians deserve a thriving economy, lower gas and grocery prices, high employment rates, school choice, and so much more. We won’t get there without strong conservative fighters willing to stand up and **PUT THE COMMONWEALTH FIRST.** Friend, I need _you_. I need you to join our team and [_**contribute to the Freitas Freedom Fund**_](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=2925ed9137cd423e8d526fbc62f66a2c&_e=xmM1f-yxD1ZjKm4fG4kOjjuj_67Fn0yL-JMvxZdWxcU65bwx3U70qa3lOK6rytdeciAQnubFVLIDlfXxVJZd0WDNbO0fVrJNqanNJrONXqoIS0lAJp_JrhRwP5aTJN2PBuGAriMfHpHqZUQOhSGJzwK3zZnDEQ9m4ECjWi8XAD2jseIGXiinWs5GFrZogAe3L4Ymi_8MeJ5Uy1y6XuF6ZAHz_elsneiZQR-GOLnTeZwh678DrWUHYBS0vhSAZz5ecCme3t0e0yqROvcKLaU028WVh2L9Lf61jsGE8pHTngQvOgLYh-WVJQy5O4pTbuM-ysZFbIUJjS85xD45--pRX_YS7bmIT_nK-wBzHfepcIWhh3_Y4jiRqGgCaYAsbhoDVGruEH7fwDYvCcidu_epxUySCLuy0KKUWXt09tnrlPGZJSQeYzHIHI57IdiIPRe_) _TODAY_. Because I am just one person using his platform to ask the people of our Commonwealth to put common sense before greed and selfish ambitions -- _something the Democrats in Richmond have forgotten to do_. clean_body: Friend, It only took six months for Joe Biden to ruin the economy, incentivize people to stay on unemployment instead of working, and endanger the future of our children’s education. If I wasn’t so ticked off, I’d say I was impressed. But I’m mad, Friend. I’m mad because America deserves better. I’m mad because Virginia deserves better than the destructive socialist policies Richmond Democrats are so keen on pushing into our communities. Virginians deserve a thriving economy, lower gas and grocery prices, high employment rates, school choice, and so much more. We won’t get there without strong conservative fighters willing to stand up and PUT THE COMMONWEALTH FIRST. Friend, I need you. I need you to join our team and TODAY. Because I am just one person using his platform to ask the people of our Commonwealth to put common sense before greed and selfish ambitions -- something the Democrats in Richmond have forgotten to do. We’re trying to raise $10,000 by WEDNESDAY AT MIDNIGHT. Will you help us out? Thank you, and I look forward to seeing your name on my list of Freitas Freedom Fund fighters. Nick Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

| I know a fighter when I see one. And this is the truth about Jake Ellzey:
Jake is a retired Navy Commander and the former Air Boss of the U.S.S. Ronald Reagan.
He commanded a fighter squadron and flew helicopters and F-18 Super Hornets during nine deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, including five combat tours. Jake even served one combat tour with SEAL Team 5 to defend our freedoms.
When Jake returned from combat, he continued to serve. Jake currently serves in the Texas State Legislature and is a reliable, trusted conservative in the State House.
Jake's conservative record is rock solid. He voted to spend $1.1 Billion dollars of state money to secure the border with Mexico in order to stop illegal immigrants from pouring into our country.
Jake voted for the bill that bans abortion after a heartbeat is dedected, standing up for life.
He voted to give citizens the constitutional right to carry a firearm, voted to make it impossible for liberal Texas cities to defund their police departments, and stood up against the socialist wave from turning Texas blue.
Jake knows what it means to fight - he put his life on the line to fight America's enemies abroad to protect our freedoms here at home.
I know he will defend your freedoms in Congress, and I could use another fighter by my side in Washington, D.C. to stop socialism from taking over our great country.
Can I count on your support? [Let's send Jake Ellzey to Congress. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VWVxSJNJNMCoXSNSpv6JsfyPM9whviAhTzS0Yu31Oxz5NTX4SLgb7f39fZCYyOm5O-wgjlu-kiVHhwBqQVa4gOLUuEdHnV0X7sicOkQdXCb9aFUhX7A5KrT1x3KJIy0OsIoFC8EOCTmR-TTOiB4csArUbP9Xf470LLeHLL24l65UUEdPVbG5gmjjMOUnlHyZbS0H8-Ax5kpukq5TlyQQ6Q==&c=pkR1oAbk14iZ6VokMo9FtuLTpVkfqxXeH3-RwKCnZrK27_ks9mFDxg==&ch=tcAgSmZL-YnT1HdIiBd5wyhDdlsBbqwwoMbczwEpuWFw39hjfdJzYw==)

| In Service,
Dan Crenshaw

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31561635/293042802/-1999872844?refcode=em21_210628_eoq6-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFkZDYxYy01YWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08EQxHLLpFYrA2fKzPJPaJ9AZi-QFLxoLnWGbFoDxJU=)

**[I care. I love it here, and I want to make sure CA remains a great place to live and thrive. I need to know what matters most to you so I can best serve your interests in Raleigh. |

Hi Peter — As governor, I have a mission statement: I want a North Carolina where people are better educated, healthier, with more money in their pockets, and where there are more equitable opportunities for people to have lives of purpose and abundance. **Every single day I come to work with this goal in mind.** That means fighting for access to affordable, quality healthcare. It means a commitment to solving our climate crisis and making our state more resilient in the face of increasing storms. It means investing in public schools. It means fighting discrimination at every turn and promoting policies that make North Carolina a better, more inclusive place to live and work for everyone. There are so many pressing issues facing our state, Peter, and the best way you can help me serve North Carolinians is by letting me know which issues are the most important to you. [**So, what issues do you care about the most? clean_body: I need to know what matters most to you so I can best serve your interests in Raleigh. | Hi Peter — As governor, I have a mission statement: I want a North Carolina where people are better educated, healthier, with more money in their pockets, and where there are more equitable opportunities for people to have lives of purpose and abundance. Every single day I come to work with this goal in mind. That means fighting for access to affordable, quality healthcare. It means a commitment to solving our climate crisis and making our state more resilient in the face of increasing storms. It means investing in public schools. It means fighting discrimination at every turn and promoting policies that make North Carolina a better, more inclusive place to live and work for everyone. There are so many pressing issues facing our state, Peter, and the best way you can help me serve North Carolinians is by letting me know which issues are the most important to you. | Thanks for all you continue to do for our state, \- Roy Cooper = Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States mailto:info@roycooper.com | Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Even the smallest donation helps us reach our goal, because we need to show the world that our campaign to elect the first Muslim and African-American U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania — and the 10th Black U.S. Senator in history — is being propelled by broad, grassroots support as we approach our planned listening tour with voters across the Commonwealth!

We can’t wait to listen to the needs and hopes of communities across Pennsylvania, but we can’t do that without the funds we need to host multiple listening events. name: Steve Nelson
subject: My son Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | **Hi, friend, my name is Steve Nelson, Thomas’ father.**

In 1980 when Thomas was four years old he built a speaker’s stand out of a large cardboard box. Seeing it, I thought to myself, “Hmm...maybe he’s planning on being a preacher like his Dad.” But no, he had just watched the 1980 debate between Jimmy Carter and Ronald Reagan, and he was inspired.

Thomas’ activism continued into high school. He and his buddy Bill organized a College Democrats chapter at Little Chute High School. He can tell you what he did at Carleton College and Princeton. But I can tell you his heart has always been for the farmers and millworkers who surrounded him in his youth. He is modern in every way, but still an old soul at his core.

Thomas has the same passion for fairness that I do; the same disgust for those who take advantage of the vulnerable. If you want someone to cover your back, he’s your man. He is tenacious. He knows how to channel his temper and tell the truth. He’s not a Preacher’s Kid for nothing!

And yet, he has a wonderful sense of humor, as you see in his ads and Instagram. Always has time for his kids and family. Keeps track of all his cousins and elders. Loves to laugh, fish, watch sports, and make time for it all.

[Now, let me get to the point. Thomas’ campaign has a big deadline coming up on Wednesday. Only if you’re able, can you chip in to support his campaign? Any amount would go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31562969/293047706/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210628_2_5&refcode2=7c3d9798-5dd8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzNkOTc5OC01ZGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvqs-ztVbNW8oLiT_GHHVMjIVlP3MJJ2pRy3bRZTO7w=) | | **[Chip in Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31562972/293047707/745679173?refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210628_2_5&refcode2=7c3d9798-5dd8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzNkOTc5OC01ZGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvqs-ztVbNW8oLiT_GHHVMjIVlP3MJJ2pRy3bRZTO7w=)**
---
P.S. in a future email, I’ll tell you what his grandmother said about him...

Peace!

Sincerely,

Steve, Dad, and if you read my diploma, The Rev. Dr. Steven M. Nelson

|

Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | | Hi, friend, my name is Steve Nelson, Thomas’ father. In 1980 when Thomas was four years old he built a speaker’s stand out of a large cardboard box. Seeing it, I thought to myself, “Hmm...maybe he’s planning on being a preacher like his Dad.” But no, he had just watched the 1980 debate between Jimmy Carter and Ronald Reagan, and he was inspired. Thomas’ activism continued into high school. He and his buddy Bill organized a College Democrats chapter at Little Chute High School. He can tell you what he did at Carleton College and Princeton. But I can tell you his heart has always been for the farmers and millworkers who surrounded him in his youth. He is modern in every way, but still an old soul at his core. Thomas has the same passion for fairness that I do; the same disgust for those who take advantage of the vulnerable. If you want someone to cover your back, he’s your man. He is tenacious. He knows how to channel his temper and tell the truth. He’s not a Preacher’s Kid for nothing! And yet, he has a wonderful sense of humor, as you see in his ads and Instagram. Always has time for his kids and family. Keeps track of all his cousins and elders. Loves to laugh, fish, watch sports, and make time for it all. = | | = P.S. in a future email, I’ll tell you what his grandmother said about him... Peace! Sincerely, Steve, Dad, and if you read my diploma, The Rev. Dr. Steven M. Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**
