name: Wendy Rogers
subject: They can’t stop the audit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE
body:
Protect Our Audit |
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)
---
| Hi Peter,

Biden's goon Merrick Garland has no constitutional authority to interfere with Arizona's audit. Per the U.S. Constitution, the states determine the method and specifics of the elections; and per the Arizona Constitution, the legislature has oversight over elections and election law.

I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was the pivotal vote for the audit. **[Can you help me fight back against Joe Biden's unconstitutional meddling?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)**

Ballot counting is finished. Then the report on the results can be given.

We have learned so much from this audit- some needed fixes, for instance, which have already prompted needed legislation.

This exercise has been a smashing success. Over 10 states sent delegations to learn and replicate Arizona's audit procedure.

**This was also privately funded.**

So what does Biden's goonish Attorney General Merrick Garland do? _Threaten Arizona, hire lawyers, and defame an effort he knows nothing about. _

For all the people and legislators who came to tour the audit and learn, Democrats were not among them. **Neither Arizona's incompetent Secretary of State nor Merrick Garland came to see the audit and study what we are doing. **
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)
---
| _**Garland wants to double the number of DOJ attorneys in its civil rights division, to persecute sovereign states like Arizona who are auditing our 2020 results.**_

The attorney general is pushing the Civil Rights Division to hire more attorneys and is announcing that within 30 days the Justice Department will double its "enforcement staff for protecting the right to vote."

Garland noted the Justice Department "will apply the same scrutiny to post-election audits to ensure they abide by federal statutory requirements to protect election records and avoid the intimidation of voters. In that regard, we will publish guidance explaining the civil and criminal statutes that apply to post-election audits."

Arizona Senate President Karen Fann, who has previously stated that the audit is not meant to overturn the 2020 election results but instead to restore trust in the system, responded claiming the process was and will remain compliant with federal and state civil rights laws.

What Garland fails to realize is that Arizona has done our homework. Four different courts of law affirmed the right of the Arizona Senate to oversee scrutiny of the election results.

The people have already voted. _No one is being stopped from voting in the 2020 election!_

**But we will do what we must to reassure the American public that elections in Arizona are secure. This audit has been critical to that regard.**
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)
---
| You know where the DOJ has ACTUAL constitutional authority to get involved and make a difference? __**On the border, with the immigration crisis that Biden created!**__

There has been human trafficking, gang activity that overwhelms local authorities, drug running, murders, and all kinds of issues relating to the humanitarian crisis that Biden created with his "catch and release" policies.

This is real. Biden is going to let a terrorist cell into the country, because they will walk through our unguarded southern border.

_**Merrick Garland is a bitter little man, who is trying to abuse the Department of Justice for nakedly political ends.**_

Thankfully, Arizona's Attorney General is ready to take Garland and Biden to court to protect Arizonans- as he should. _Garland will not stop the audit._

Where Garland needs to be is on the border. He hasn't gone there, Kamala Harris hasn't gone there, yet the Governor of Florida, Gov. DeSantis, is sending National Guard troops to help us man the border that the Feds left unguarded.

**Right now, it feels like it's Arizona vs. Biden's regime.[Help us win this fight!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)**
---
| Election integrity isn't an untested theory. **We have proof. Hard proof. And we are learning just how to close these election law loopholes.**

I am the key vote that allowed the audit to proceed.And I have been front and center to defend it against the far-Left. [That's why I need to ask for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)

**Biden wants to shut us down in the WORST way. We can't let him! **[Stand with me so we can finish the job!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)

_I will stand up and speak the truth about this audit. We have nothing to hide and nothing to be ashamed of![So I need your help!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)_

[Help me fight for the truth!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r) \- Help me keep my seat so we can fight back against Biden, together!

Thank you and God bless you.
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)
---
| Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret)
Arizona State Senator
Arizona's 6th Legislative District
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r)
---
| P.S. I am fighting hard to fulfill my campaign promises. I am taking a lot of heat but I don't care. [Please support me by helping me raise my goal by the end of this month.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57825585:JDPZyDlwN:m:1:3253819041:B8C5899623D619BC4A1EEEF37F559FAB:r) Thank you.

PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE

clean_body: Protect Our Audit | | | | Hi Peter, Biden's goon Merrick Garland has no constitutional authority to interfere with Arizona's audit. Per the U.S. Constitution, the states determine the method and specifics of the elections; and per the Arizona Constitution, the legislature has oversight over elections and election law. I am Senator Wendy Rogers, the Arizona State Senator who was the pivotal vote for the audit. Ballot counting is finished. Then the report on the results can be given. We have learned so much from this audit- some needed fixes, for instance, which have already prompted needed legislation. This exercise has been a smashing success. Over 10 states sent delegations to learn and replicate Arizona's audit procedure. This was also privately funded. So what does Biden's goonish Attorney General Merrick Garland do? Threaten Arizona, hire lawyers, and defame an effort he knows nothing about. For all the people and legislators who came to tour the audit and learn, Democrats were not among them. Neither Arizona's incompetent Secretary of State nor Merrick Garland came to see the audit and study what we are doing. | | Garland wants to double the number of DOJ attorneys in its civil rights division, to persecute sovereign states like Arizona who are auditing our 2020 results. The attorney general is pushing the Civil Rights Division to hire more attorneys and is announcing that within 30 days the Justice Department will double its "enforcement staff for protecting the right to vote." Garland noted the Justice Department "will apply the same scrutiny to post-election audits to ensure they abide by federal statutory requirements to protect election records and avoid the intimidation of voters. In that regard, we will publish guidance explaining the civil and criminal statutes that apply to post-election audits." Arizona Senate President Karen Fann, who has previously stated that the audit is not meant to overturn the 2020 election results but instead to restore trust in the system, responded claiming the process was and will remain compliant with federal and state civil rights laws. What Garland fails to realize is that Arizona has done our homework. Four different courts of law affirmed the right of the Arizona Senate to oversee scrutiny of the election results. The people have already voted. No one is being stopped from voting in the 2020 election! But we will do what we must to reassure the American public that elections in Arizona are secure. This audit has been critical to that regard. | | You know where the DOJ has ACTUAL constitutional authority to get involved and make a difference? On the border, with the immigration crisis that Biden created! There has been human trafficking, gang activity that overwhelms local authorities, drug running, murders, and all kinds of issues relating to the humanitarian crisis that Biden created with his "catch and release" policies. This is real. Biden is going to let a terrorist cell into the country, because they will walk through our unguarded southern border. Merrick Garland is a bitter little man, who is trying to abuse the Department of Justice for nakedly political ends. Thankfully, Arizona's Attorney General is ready to take Garland and Biden to court to protect Arizonans- as he should. Garland will not stop the audit. Where Garland needs to be is on the border. He hasn't gone there, Kamala Harris hasn't gone there, yet the Governor of Florida, Gov. DeSantis, is sending National Guard troops to help us man the border that the Feds left unguarded. Right now, it feels like it's Arizona vs. Biden's regime. | Election integrity isn't an untested theory. We have proof. Hard proof. And we are learning just how to close these election law loopholes. I am the key vote that allowed the audit to proceed.And I have been front and center to defend it against the far-Left. Biden wants to shut us down in the WORST way. We can't let him! I will stand up and speak the truth about this audit. We have nothing to hide and nothing to be ashamed of \- Help me keep my seat so we can fight back against Biden, together! Thank you and God bless you. | | Wendy Rogers, Lt Col USAF (ret) Arizona State Senator Arizona's 6th Legislative District | | P.S. I am fighting hard to fulfill my campaign promises. I am taking a lot of heat but I don't care. Thank you. PAID FOR BY WENDY ROGERS FOR AZ SENATE Wendy Rogers is a retired member of the Air Force. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright(C) 2021 Wendy Rogers for AZ Senate, All rights reserved. body:
| **'Fundamentally dangerous': Ron Johnson has long history of promoting views at odds with scientific research**
_\-- Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_

[**This is rich, Peter... Ron Johnson is pretending to care about people’s lives while pushing anti-vaccine conspiracies. Chip in $5 to help us defeat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31563724/293050070/-521710702?gpsid=31_130_19501&refcode=em21_210628_EOQ10_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210628_EOQ10_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGQyNDg2Ni02MGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMMiyOwhv1lVCrTUksP16W_CrdZyRxaLuPhzXQ_fMmo=)
---

Hey Peter, it’s been nice not having to wake up and check Twitter to see what disaster Donald Trump said today. And then... there’s Ron Johnson.

He held a press event in Milwaukee today where he continued to spread a dangerous conspiracy theory about the COVID-19 vaccine. The misinformation he’s peddling is so dangerous and ridiculous, doctors are _literally_ calling him out on it!

The truth is, Ron Johnson thinks that he can scare Wisconsinites into voting for him for another term in the Senate. So, he’s abandoning all reality and going full-blown Trump to get the former president’s attention and his rolodex full of wealthy donors. Peter, we're going to make sure voters see who this guy really is -- a fearmonger.

We need to replace Ron Johnson with someone like Sarah Godlewski who actually believes in science, trusts the facts, and listens to the experts -- not conspiracy theories.

[**But if we want to beat him, then it's absolutely critical we reach our very first FEC fundraising goal ahead of Wednesday's deadline. Sarah is counting on your grassroots support to take on Ron Johnson. Chip in $5 or more right here if you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31563726/293050072/-521710702?gpsid=31_130_19501&refcode=em21_210628_EOQ10_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210628_EOQ10_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGQyNDg2Ni02MGQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMMiyOwhv1lVCrTUksP16W_CrdZyRxaLuPhzXQ_fMmo=)

We can't defeat Ron Johnson without your support, Peter. Let’s do this.

Thanks,

clean_body: | 'Fundamentally dangerous': Ron Johnson has long history of promoting views at odds with scientific research \-- Milwaukee Journal Sentinel = Hey Peter, it’s been nice not having to wake up and check Twitter to see what disaster Donald Trump said today. And then... there’s Ron Johnson. He held a press event in Milwaukee today where he continued to spread a dangerous conspiracy theory about the COVID-19 vaccine. The misinformation he’s peddling is so dangerous and ridiculous, doctors are literally calling him out on it! The truth is, Ron Johnson thinks that he can scare Wisconsinites into voting for him for another term in the Senate. So, he’s abandoning all reality and going full-blown Trump to get the former president’s attention and his rolodex full of wealthy donors. Peter, we're going to make sure voters see who this guy really is -- a fearmonger. We need to replace Ron Johnson with someone like Sarah Godlewski who actually believes in science, trusts the facts, and listens to the experts -- not conspiracy theories. = We can't defeat Ron Johnson without your support, Peter. body:
It’s almost over! Friend, My family has been in Kansas for 5 generations. There’s no better place to live, work, and raise a family, and I am a firm believer that each generation must leave Kansas better than they found it. For that reason, I have a very important request. **I’m running for Governor of Kansas to help bring common sense and conservative leadership to this great state.** We need a backstop here in Kansas to defend against the onslaught of radical policies and ideas coming from Democrats in Washington, which is why I need your help. clean_body: It’s almost over! Friend, My family has been in Kansas for 5 generations. There’s no better place to live, work, and raise a family, and I am a firm believer that each generation must leave Kansas better than they found it. For that reason, I have a very important request. I’m running for Governor of Kansas to help bring common sense and conservative leadership to this great state. We need a backstop here in Kansas to defend against the onslaught of radical policies and ideas coming from Democrats in Washington, which is why I need your help. We’re coming up on the end of our first full quarter since launching our campaign, and we must finish strong. Having the necessary resources to defeat the Left is the only way we’ll win, friend. As Attorney General of Kansas, I have a proven track record of fighting for the conservative values that we all share – the values that make Kansas great: We need Kansas back in the trusted hands of someone who fights for families, workers, and small businesses, not Big Government and Woke Corporations. This race won’t be easy, but if we want any chance of taking back our state from Laura Kelly’s poor leadership, we need all hands on deck as we finish out this quarter. Do I have your support? Thank you, Derek Schmidt Candidate for Governor of Kansas | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

clean_body: | | | | | , | I wanted to reach out about our critical End of Quarter deadline this week. As you know, we are less than one year away from kicking off our general election. These first months of the Biden government have been a disaster, and it’s clear that Nancy Pelosi and the liberal Squad are just getting started. It is vital thatwe return a conservative majority to congress before it is too late. From day one, I’ve made it a point to stand up in direct opposition to Nancy Pelosi in congress. Now, she is primed to make Iowa a prime battleground for the midterm elections. We MUST be prepared. I know I can count on strong patriots like yourself to help us meet our End of Quarter goal. | | | | | | | | | Whatever you can send will go towards holding the line in Iowa and taking the gavel from Pelosi’s hands. name: Marco Lopez
subject: I have to ask

body:
I'm running for governor to put an end to GOP corruption and build a state that works for all our people
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565194/293054737/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFkOTk0Ny02NWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFvU9-v_jnDyCTVIzFZ-SYuv0zV4o1oE7WwmDRGPFKg=)
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to chip in to help us hit our $25,000 end-of-quarter goal and power the campaign that's going to flip Arizona blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my story is classically Arizonan: My parents taught me to work hard and dream big, and if I did that, anything was possible.

Throughout my life, that promise held true for me – and I've dedicated my life to making it real for others, too. I've focused on bringing people together to collaborate for the common good, solving big problems everywhere from my hometown, where I served as mayor, to the Obama administration.
But not everyone wants to solve problems. From passing voter suppression bills to conducting corrupt election audits, failed Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward would rather divide us and spread lies about the 2020 election than tackle the real problems facing our state. **I'm running for governor to put an end to GOP corruption and build a state that works for _all_ our people, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So please, if you want a governor who will truly fight for you, I have to ask: **
**[Will you give $5 or more now to help us reach our must-hit end-of-quarter goal before the deadline? Every dollar will fuel our people-powered movement to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and restore the promise of our great state – and this goal is our most important yet.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565197/293054739/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFkOTk0Ny02NWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFvU9-v_jnDyCTVIzFZ-SYuv0zV4o1oE7WwmDRGPFKg=)**
Donating to our campaign is about more than just the amount – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, revitalize our economy and build a state that works for _all_ our people.

I know we can power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – we delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but _still_ have a Republican governor. **And now, Arizona Republicans are pushing a sham election audit designed to keep Democrats from EVER winning another election. But we don't have to sit by and watch it happen.**
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a _toss-up –_ which means we have a real chance at flipping Arizona blue. The snag is, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power.
To flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make progress for all our people, I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me. **So please, I'm counting on your support: [Rush $5 or more now – before our critical end-of-quarter deadline – to power our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565200/293054742/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFkOTk0Ny02NWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFvU9-v_jnDyCTVIzFZ-SYuv0zV4o1oE7WwmDRGPFKg=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565202/293054745/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFkOTk0Ny02NWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFvU9-v_jnDyCTVIzFZ-SYuv0zV4o1oE7WwmDRGPFKg=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565203/293054747/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk77-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFkOTk0Ny02NWQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFvU9-v_jnDyCTVIzFZ-SYuv0zV4o1oE7WwmDRGPFKg=)

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. body:
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565412/293055477/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmI3ZmEyYS02NmQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_t2bwyyom1zW6NQEKOIeeC6me5lhAwpGR0SBhoFARRs=&emci=abc0c4db-63d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0bb7fa2a-66d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend - As we prepare to celebrate our nation’s independence, we must bolster our commitment to preserving our democracy. To continue the fight for federal action to protect our freedom to vote, we’re keeping the heat on our U.S. Senators to pass S 1, the For the People Act. It is because of dedicated activists, allied organizations, and volunteers like YOU that we secured Democratic unity on S 1 in a crucial first-step vote last week. **We made over 30,000 Hot Call Summer calls to our Senators just this month (!!), and we must keep the pressure on. Continue calling and making your voice heard—the number to be connected to your Senators is 888-453-3211.** Our work is just beginning. We’re going to keep turning up the heat on our Senators all summer long. We’ll have more to share soon (stay tuned!), and in the meantime here’s what you need to know: Democrats in the Senate continue to work tirelessly to negotiate a bill that protects the freedom to vote. Yet even though the For the People Act has strong bipartisan support from the American people, Republicans in Congress are defying the will of Americans by denying even a debate on the bill. As the Senate moves forward to consider voting legislation, it is critical that they do everything they can to protect the freedom to vote. This should include reducing long lines at polling locations, stopping voter intimidation, protecting election workers, protecting and expanding vote by mail, ensuring fair districts, and safeguarding the will of voters. The patriotic work of forming a more perfect union requires us to buckle down and demand equal justice—and equal access to the ballot box—for all. **Keep contacting your Senators at 888-453-3211 and learn more at[StopJimCrow2.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565413/293055478/768938118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmI3ZmEyYS02NmQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_t2bwyyom1zW6NQEKOIeeC6me5lhAwpGR0SBhoFARRs=&emci=abc0c4db-63d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0bb7fa2a-66d8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277).** Let’s get it done! Thank you for all you do, \- Team Fair Fight Action |

body:
Last week, Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds signed troubling new laws to criminalize peaceful protest, chill freedom of speech, and cut taxes for wealthy donors. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565627/293055919/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210628eoq2_tr_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjBmYmEwMi02N2Q4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QhhjBJo8HS6YV9yRefVZug4zsLh3nkuYjlnjOQ6ZBUE=)

Team, **Last week, Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds signed troubling new laws to criminalize peaceful protest, chill freedom of speech, and cut taxes for wealthy donors.** We all agree that Iowans need safe streets and more money in their pockets, but this legislation only moves us even further away from those common goals. Governor Reynolds has continued to divide Iowans by signing bills into law that will undermine Iowans’ First Amendment rights and weaken public safety by increasing penalties for protests and expanding police immunity. In contrast, last year Ras led the way in passing the Plan for a More Perfect Union unanimously, which bans chokeholds and increases accountability to ensure that a murder like that of George Floyd doesn't happen in Iowa. Plus, Governor Reynolds signed another bill to let rich donors and big corporations make off like bandits at the expense of our state’s budget, local public safety services, and schools. **While Governor Reynolds is signing bills that will hurt instead of help Iowans, Ras is running to do the exact opposite.** Hardworking Iowans are tired of being left out in the cold and disregarded by the extreme agenda of this administration. Ras is running for governor to return the power to the people of Iowa. **[With our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline approaching in two days, will you chip in $10 or more to support Ras and make it clear that Iowans are ready for real representation in the governor’s office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31565628/293055920/1836405079?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210628eoq2_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjBmYmEwMi02N2Q4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QhhjBJo8HS6YV9yRefVZug4zsLh3nkuYjlnjOQ6ZBUE=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Last week, Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds signed troubling new laws to criminalize peaceful protest, chill freedom of speech, and cut taxes for wealthy donors. | = Team, Last week, Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds signed troubling new laws to criminalize peaceful protest, chill freedom of speech, and cut taxes for wealthy donors. We all agree that Iowans need safe streets and more money in their pockets, but this legislation only moves us even further away from those common goals. Governor Reynolds has continued to divide Iowans by signing bills into law that will undermine Iowans’ First Amendment rights and weaken public safety by increasing penalties for protests and expanding police immunity. In contrast, last year Ras led the way in passing the Plan for a More Perfect Union unanimously, which bans chokeholds and increases accountability to ensure that a murder like that of George Floyd doesn't happen in Iowa. Plus, Governor Reynolds signed another bill to let rich donors and big corporations make off like bandits at the expense of our state’s budget, local public safety services, and schools. While Governor Reynolds is signing bills that will hurt instead of help Iowans, Ras is running to do the exact opposite. Hardworking Iowans are tired of being left out in the cold and disregarded by the extreme agenda of this administration. Ras is running for governor to return the power to the people of Iowa. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for having Ras’s back ahead of this crucial deadline. — Team Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.
clean_body: They teamed up with a far-left super PAC run by Hillary, Kamala, and Chuck Schumer allies... Peter, the far-left just won’t quit. FIRST: They used all of their power in the mainstream media to trash me, every other former Trump staffer, and say we shouldn’t work! THEN: They teamed up with a far-left super PAC run by Hillary, Kamala, and Chuck Schumer allies to launch over $100,000 in attack ads against me because they think they can buy your vote. NOW: We’re just days away from our End-of-Quarter deadline and I need YOUR help to fight back. Will you make an urgent donation to make sure we meet our goals? Peter, we know why the left has chosen to act. They are absolutely terrified of everything coming their way when we win. They know I will be a strong defender of freedom - saying no to their socialist agenda - and that scares them more than anything. But Peter, I've never backed down before and I won't back down now! I need your help, though, to fight back before our June 30th deadline at 11:59PM. Will you donate to the DEFEND SARAH FUND now? Thank you, Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Want to donate a different way? or mail a check: PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600. Corporate contributions are not permissible. Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law. State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

Bad news, team. We fell short of our emergency weekend goal with three days left until the end-of-quarter. This deadline will set up our campaign for the rest of the election. And right now, it could go one of two ways:
1. **If we hit our goal,** we'll report strong fundraising numbers on Wednesday, sending a strong message to Mitch McConnell and his special interest groups that we’ll fight back against their false attacks.
2. **If we miss our goal,** Republicans will take our low fundraising numbers as a sign of weakness and descend upon New Hampshire with excessive amounts of dark money.

**[If we want to avoid the second scenario, we NEED to make up for our missed goal and then some. So I'm reaching out to our top supporters to see if you can rush a donation of $5, or whatever you can, today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31566536/293058330/1251890980?refcode=e20210628_bad-news-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmEzZDUzYS02YmQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSZseEK9G0nFgTE3Q_qLfZijv-OD5UAUVNIThI1iq4U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31566537/293058332/1251890980?refcode=e20210628_bad-news-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmEzZDUzYS02YmQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSZseEK9G0nFgTE3Q_qLfZijv-OD5UAUVNIThI1iq4U=)

In 2016, Maggie won by only 1,017 votes, making her one of the most vulnerable incumbent Democrats up for reelection. Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans know this and are focusing all their efforts on flipping this seat. They're spending big on attack ads, putting RNC staff on the ground in New Hampshire, wooing potential far-right opponents, and more -- I can’t even imagine what they'll do if our FEC report is weak.
**[If we're going to protect Maggie's seat and the Senate majority, we need your help. If you can, please chip in $5 right now to make up for our missed goal and show Republicans the strength of this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/31566546/293058350/1251890980?refcode=e20210628_bad-news-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmEzZDUzYS02YmQ4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wSZseEK9G0nFgTE3Q_qLfZijv-OD5UAUVNIThI1iq4U=)**

body:
Every Seat Matters! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6aa61eb52a39/flipwa03-4947938?e=9a7df6c10f)
---
[](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=d6a1a9cb69&e=9a7df6c10f)
### Let's Heal Washington!
**Hello Peter ,**
**We know that you know how the House seats are being re-assigned...** ... but have you considered how important this will make each and every seat in the 2022 race. Seven traditionally Blue states are losing seats, while six Red states have picked up a total of seven seats.
[](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=003fa4a64a&e=9a7df6c10f)
**We need to keep the house! We need to #FlipWA03! You can help.** I am Brent Hennrich, and I am the Democratic Candidate for Washington’s third District, and I need your help. We cannot cede control of the house to a party that is condemning it’s own members for condemning the actions of January 6th, 2021.
#### [Donate 25$ today to help Brent get to Congress](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=568e33a305&e=9a7df6c10f)
Since she stood up and voted to impeach #45 for his role in the “Big Lie” that ultimately culminated in the riotous insurrection of January 6th, 2021, Jaime Herrera Beutler has been besieged by opponents from the furthest reaches of _her own side of the aisle._ In an apparent “If you can’t beat them, join them” move _,_ she herself has begun to embrace the lies spread to stoke fear in her base _._ It is becoming apparent with Washington’s “Top Two” primary, we **must** address those who’s platforms are built on lies, fear, and conspiracies.
[](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=9223d10811&e=9a7df6c10f)
Her most vocal and outspoken GOP opponent is US Army veteran Joe Kent. While I thank him for his years of service, my appreciation of him ends there. He has publicly stated his wishes to abolish the Department of Education, to reinstate the Trump era Muslim travel ban, and to **completely eliminate** any and all Pro-choice options for women.He is openly supported by some GOP “#AmericaFirst All-Stars like the Q-anon loving Marjorie Taylor Greene (Q-GA), and the “currently under DOJ investigation for sex trafficking of minors” Matt Gaetz (Q-FL)As you may already know, Washington is a “Top Two” State. That means if we don not have the support now to get the message out to the voters of my district we could very well end up with two Republican candidates on the general election ballot come November 2022. The voting system in Washington does not allow for a write-in option in the general election.With Red States gaining more congressional seats, Blue states losing many, and redistricting lines being gerrymandered by partisan commissions, this seat could very well determine what party controls the House majority in the next Congress.
#### [Donate 25$ today to help Brent get to Congress](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=de720d4e93&e=9a7df6c10f)!
**I ask you to join me in keeping America’s Democracy intact! Please help me get the word out. Early support will make a large difference in this race, so tell your friends and neighbors, and if you can, please donate! Together we can**[**#FlipWA03**](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=ee03712502&e=9a7df6c10f)**You can support my run now by donating**[**BH4C.win.**](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=b918fbcb49&e=9a7df6c10f)**You can learn more about me by visiting**[**BH4C.com**](https://BH4C.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=27739a80cfdaa3b90571b5a42&id=8b2444a88e&e=9a7df6c10f)

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: We must protect the legacy of the Stonewall uprising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/75177/images/dd24bcc8-059c-44ac-b48a-2c2faf74be7c-jfTv2c.jpeg]
Dear Friend,
On the anniversary of the Stonewall uprising, one of the most pivotal moments in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights in America, I always think of The Holiday, Pittsburgh's oldest gay bar.
You see, when I was growing up my parents owned a bar right across the street from The Holiday. At a time when the gay community was under constant threat and forced to hide, the owners, Chuck and Chuck, were my parents' friends and neighbors in the most ordinary way.
But the impact they had on me was anything but ordinary. Seeing gay people express themselves in the safety of The Holiday when I would run over to borrow some ice taught me important lessons about love and acceptance — and also sharply reminded me how they had so few places where they were allowed to be themselves.
When I look back on the strides the LGBTQ+ community has made in demanding — and winning — equal rights and acceptance, I think back to the people atTthe Holiday who simply wanted to be true to themselves and the people they loved.
Can you chip in whatever you can to protect the LGBTQ+ community from radical right-wing politicians like Scott Perry fighting to turn back the clock? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022primary]
Just this week we marked the sixth anniversary of the Obergefell case, saw the NFL welcome another openly gay player last week, and the Supreme Court refused to even hear a case that could overturn the right of transgender children to use the bathroom of their choice.
However, I don't have to tell you there are still powerful forces in our country actively fighting to turn back the clock. When the rights of millions of people and families to simply exist depend on a few seats on the Supreme Court, our work is far from finished.
It's our job to not only protect our House Majority in 2022, but to elect legislators who will fight to protect the hard-won rights of LGBTQ+ Americans.
Can you chip in $10 to honor the legacy of Stonewall and those long-ago patrons of The Holiday in Pittsburgh? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022primary]
Thanks,
Eugene
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scottperrydanger]
We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to.
Eugene DePasquale is considering running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit EugeneForCongress.com [https://eugeneforcongress.com/] . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
https://www.facebook.com/DePasqualePA/ [https://www.facebook.com/DePasqualePA/] https://twitter.com/DePasqualePA [https://twitter.com/DePasqualePA] https://www.instagram.com/eugene_depasquale/ [https://www.instagram.com/eugene_depasquale/]
This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. Chip in any amount to help Eugene flip PA-10 blue in one of the most competitive races in the entire country.
Donate to Eugene [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasquale-for-pa-1?refcode=email_infrastructure_20210611&amount=100]
Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 [#]
United States [#]

Hey Peter,

This is Bob Ferguson, and I'm the Attorney General here in Washington State.

Last year, Matt Larkin challenged me for Attorney General -- he's the same Republican now running for Congress against Kim in Washington's 8th District. I know a bit more about Larkin than most people, so I want to share who Kim is up against and why it's crucial we help her win in 2022.

Larkin is a self-described "conservative Republican" who, during our campaign, said he "loves all the things Trump does." In a recent interview, Larkin "wouldn't say whether he believes President Joe Biden's win over Donald Trump was legitimate or whether he buys into Trump's unproven and false claims of widespread fraud."

I know firsthand Matt Larkin will say anything to get elected. He attacked me on the airwaves with negative ads, and it's only a matter of time before he does the same to Kim. **We can't afford to have Larkin representing the 8th District in Congress.**

**[Will you join me in supporting Kim's campaign? Kim is the partner I need in D.C. fighting for the issues Washingtonians care most about, but she has a tough fight ahead of her against an opponent willing to invest significant personal funds to get elected. Hey Peter, This is Bob Ferguson, and I'm the Attorney General here in Washington State. Last year, Matt Larkin challenged me for Attorney General -- he's the same Republican now running for Congress against Kim in Washington's 8th District. I know a bit more about Larkin than most people, so I want to share who Kim is up against and why it's crucial we help her win in 2022. Larkin is a self-described "conservative Republican" who, during our campaign, said he "loves all the things Trump does." In a recent interview, Larkin "wouldn't say whether he believes President Joe Biden's win over Donald Trump was legitimate or whether he buys into Trump's unproven and false claims of widespread fraud." I know firsthand Matt Larkin will say anything to get elected. He attacked me on the airwaves with negative ads, and it's only a matter of time before he does the same to Kim. We can't afford to have Larkin representing the 8th District in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Since flipping the 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018, Kim has delivered for our state in Congress. body:
Every dollar we raise will show leaders across the country that Americans support bold climate action.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/EqrVCGw~e-tx/ai9ldGU1eGM2ZDQ0VlhOTG5Jc1BTeHRmU1h6WDUyTGlDeVduQkpWRUV6QTQ2OXVZWDByMkc4N0wzN3A2RnUxeU9Ha2RDT29USkUvZkxiZFNoNnIxR29ZNHBKRzBQSTB0UUtEcUI1a3o3cVk9S0/QU16WGNMajd3UjQ2RmU3YVI1R01kVHFJZG41bVRqWWY0YTJSR3R1SzdPaz0S1) Friend, For decades, scientists told us that carbon emissions were heating Earth's atmosphere. They warned that if we didn't take action, the results would be catastrophic. We know how that turned out. Republicans, abetted by Big Oil, didn't just drag their feet -- they denied science, they delayed action, they put corporate donors ahead of all of us. Now, in 2021, those decades-old predictions are coming true. We saw the wildfires last summer. The floods throughout the South. And now, droughts and heat waves threaten states across the country. In fact, in Washington state this week, we're experiencing a heat wave so severe that our temperatures (over 100 degrees Fahrenheit) could break _all-time_ record highs. You know where I stand: We need bold climate action to reverse decades of bad policy. But talk isn't nearly enough. So here in Washington state, we're taking the lead and passing historic laws (more on that in a bit). But there's more work to do, and our ability to make progress is only as strong as the political power behind us. **[So today, I'm humbly asking: Will you make a contribution of $5 before our official end-of-month deadline, so we can keep showing the world what bold climate action looks like?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/GRW2C3eNmbJE/ai9ldGU1eGM2ZDQ0VlhOTG5Jc1BTeHRmU1h6WDUyTGlDeVduQkpWRUV6QTQ2OXVZWDByMkc4N0wzN3A2RnUxeU9Ha2RDT29USkUvZkxiZFNoNnIxR29ZNHBKRzBQSTB0UUtEcUI1a3o3cVk9S0/QU16WGNMajd3UjQ2RmU3YVI1R01kVHFJZG41bVRqWWY0YTJSR3R1SzdPaz0S1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/YGD4cbvzZmCv/ai9ldGU1eGM2ZDQ0VlhOTG5Jc1BTeHRmU1h6WDUyTGlDeVduQkpWRUV6QTQ2OXVZWDByMkc4N0wzN3A2RnUxeU9Ha2RDT29USkUvZkxiZFNoNnIxR29ZNHBKRzBQSTB0UUtEcUI1a3o3cVk9S0/QU16WGNMajd3UjQ2RmU3YVI1R01kVHFJZG41bVRqWWY0YTJSR3R1SzdPaz0S1)

Just this year, thanks to your support, we've made big strides in reducing emissions here in Washington state:
* We passed a new Clean Fuel Standard to reduce emissions and create more jobs in clean energy.
* We created a cap-and-invest program that limits and reduces greenhouse gas emissions across our economy.
* And we enacted one of the strongest environmental justice policies in the nation, giving members of frontline communities a voice in policy design and investment decisions.

But we can't solve the climate crisis alone, and the crisis is growing. Already, tens of millions of Americans have seen temperatures soar above 100 degrees Fahrenheit -- _and this isn 't typically the hottest part of the year._
**Every dollar we raise now will fuel our work as we continue to raise the standard for bold climate action -- and show elected leaders across the country that Americans support it.[Will you make a donation right now, before our June 30 deadline, to keep this movement going?](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/GRW2C3eNmbJE/ai9ldGU1eGM2ZDQ0VlhOTG5Jc1BTeHRmU1h6WDUyTGlDeVduQkpWRUV6QTQ2OXVZWDByMkc4N0wzN3A2RnUxeU9Ha2RDT29USkUvZkxiZFNoNnIxR29ZNHBKRzBQSTB0UUtEcUI1a3o3cVk9S0/QU16WGNMajd3UjQ2RmU3YVI1R01kVHFJZG41bVRqWWY0YTJSR3R1SzdPaz0S1)**
Thank you for contributing to our progress thus far. I truly couldn't do this without you.
Very truly yours,
Jay

I have in my hand proof that Maxine Waters and her campaign lied under oath in court: Maxine argued and spent thousands of dollars lying to voters that I was dishonorably discharged. But because the judge was a Democrat and her position depended on letting Maxine off the hook, the judge let her off the hook. We’re taking this hard evidence to an appeals court, where Maxine has ZERO leverage to influence the outcome. But there’s a catch, Maxine and her lawyers are dragging this out and forcing us to spend millions hoping this goes away. This is more than just Maxine being a liar. Peter,

I know you have better things to be doing than reading about a congressional race a full 1.5 years before Election Day, but for me, **talking, writing, and emailing about this race is currently my life.** It’s all consuming, and I wouldn’t have it any other way.

Last year, I came within 5 percentage points of defeating one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress. And quite frankly, it was because of conservatives like YOU. The kind words of encouragement helped get us through campaigning during a pandemic; **[the generous donations enabled us to outspend my opponent and attract the support from the national Republican Party.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=11ace971613d45319356d86142bbee51&_e=mMSM-fTZtCneBE5XfDfLC1caVpu6R_5KcJqFU4bo56hlrq1DjfX2CjrOqhoQctO_a-VmrdsxBbRB4pnevZRNVzwdvTd6WIlsGmN6n3IVpEF0sMvYVYD2xmFZ1pykpOoKBDyIiKOm0yioQEQTGwus2ddgDmej9q44Ebw7uxPRH7T7KV7c5o8PPYTsXry3F3ShoqdY8JPfcKszyjniemYLPCzvkbOSjBB3mbCAWDKo2rt4BsWJU1HezG1_xhlUlaordEaKtywxdSV0tPAJNsbBUFKJVBSuZ4yrAQXJM9_yl_NDMA2TuWfr4HPzk8Vi70Ld6x12D-NGEAfpD-QaDWuAy8AQKj-MA0-n4BfzRpQ12wLkBNfVSVhvQ2YpF4fhK1vWj4huQYJSN7pSjlyVImA2a2cmUpQrMjLLcpnOz_KkdyIWj8wUr3odtDZY-cOnm9SW)**

The NRCC (National Republican Campaign Committee) has their eyes on me once again. With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, they’re already identifying potential top races to invest in. **My race in Oregon’s 4th District is one they’re looking at seriously.**

**But as I’ve written to you before, I have to prove that I can raise $100,000 online before they’ll formally begin to advise and invest in my campaign.**

**We’ve set an internal deadline of reaching this goal by midnight on June 30th - JUST 48 hours NOW.** **[We’re currently sitting at 95% of our goal raised, and we need your IMMEDIATE HELP to make sure that the last 5% doesn’t elude us.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=11ace971613d45319356d86142bbee51&_e=mMSM-fTZtCneBE5XfDfLC1caVpu6R_5KcJqFU4bo56hlrq1DjfX2CjrOqhoQctO_a-VmrdsxBbRB4pnevZRNVzwdvTd6WIlsGmN6n3IVpEF0sMvYVYD2xmFZ1pykpOoKBDyIiKOm0yioQEQTGwus2ddgDmej9q44Ebw7uxPRH7T7KV7c5o8PPYTsXry3F3ShoqdY8JPfcKszyjniemYLPCzvkbOSjBB3mbCAWDKo2rsLTHPoDoo6mGuPV6W-qcf8NCav-w1zV8vb1N32ThoShjXmx_QtduhkyIlMbylvVpsjno8XwnJ8RC8ZViioNStrB_tyHOKzB285qNzs5c-1qYXuLwpiXOdrkmAmAuWcskHnJLpzzvQXbdi8wzMWL4KTDQaqlDWUpuQCjgHENAgbXi138lTXiF-CqtAmmcEVcFRfAw18asO9ExsgJDbJKuDC)**

clean_body: With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, they’re already identifying potential top races to invest in I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, I know you have better things to be doing than reading about a congressional race a full 1.5 years before Election Day, but for me, talking, writing, and emailing about this race is currently my life. It’s all consuming, and I wouldn’t have it any other way. Last year, I came within 5 percentage points of defeating one of the most entrenched Democrats in Congress. And quite frankly, it was because of conservatives like YOU. The kind words of encouragement helped get us through campaigning during a pandemic; The NRCC (National Republican Campaign Committee) has their eyes on me once again. With Republicans only needing to flip FIVE SEATS to win back control of the House, they’re already identifying potential top races to invest in. My race in Oregon’s 4th District is one they’re looking at seriously. But as I’ve written to you before, I have to prove that I can raise $100,000 online before they’ll formally begin to advise and invest in my campaign. We’ve set an internal deadline of reaching this goal by midnight on June 30th - JUST 48 hours NOW. I’m running again because I know that with a full year and a half of campaigning - introducing myself to voters I couldn’t last time due to COVID-19 restrictions - we will take out Peter DeFazio and with our victory help deliver the House a Republican majority. Thanks for your help. Respectfully, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Whether you live in California or not, this recall has national implications. A recall of Gavin Newsom is a victory for America, not just California. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6fc7e634bbf1400db9ac39acc8c8018c&_e=rpi_Ey-SVXWSHhCTTnPNzO6We4uppMXiHswW82T_ofp9jw9dn_NGPtZ07XfpshAcnKZuo9zTASM5l7Zn_BTeeMZlER6kZQ8njnio28z2A30ItcNqaajKTyM8gL3Bzu1BKsd909GZmhFIcNfmn0pE2ihjBiQhqTvytK6iigNVDnj-5YNfpS_U4-O12L7rqH1u-aufp_Lj_grfUNRK0pHpNOHxSrwC1cD-8ZoYRT4MHaRN8l0KS999AZ_F6yT4Zoe-YcyvP8YaHjNQx-bNC6KQWUTi_kUI_kwUhM3gIDlRWTeTERyV-7CVPo02VFCewltPF35oSrKbFWJx2SfAX-LKdA%3D%3D)

Peter,

We're on the verge of **recalling the governor of the largest Democrat-run state in the country:** Gavin Newsom of California.

Whether you live in California or not, this recall has national implications.

If we can kick Newsom out of office it will not only transform California but **deal a huge blow to liberals across the country** - _including in Congress and the White House_ - who are trying to implement the same oppressive, destructive and radical agenda that he has. Our Secretary of State just confirmed that enough valid signatures exist to **force a recall election this Fall** , which means we're pressing full steam ahead to kick Gavin to the curb and we need help from the grassroots across the nation who are **tired of the oppressive and radical liberal agenda.**

[**Will you help us deal a huge blow to the liberal agenda and recall the Left's favorite governor - Gavin Newsom - by chipping in $5, $15, $25, $50 or even $100 today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6fc7e634bbf1400db9ac39acc8c8018c&_e=rpi_Ey-SVXWSHhCTTnPNzO6We4uppMXiHswW82T_ofp9jw9dn_NGPtZ07XfpshAcnKZuo9zTASM5l7Zn_BTeeMZlER6kZQ8njnio28z2A30ItcNqaajKTyM8gL3Bzu1Be0XZsAKNATb_TK9zoxTDMYt2llZAh1gIPB9lbl3v0g88RCyB5YlN8GO09UxKgMaAYHXY1LUUFGW3oQhGYlM6eiPvxFAngB8Npur8n26HbDc8SggvMKJ2Zh-rmplTdIDu33maaRrkgqso7wYPohyNjEFrjkaXi3MnhP8sVzbw4UiBuH5zKGJmZ1q3nBOpeXAZ6fLkhGP8GQrawdyEiBUpWQ%3D%3D)

[HELP RECALL NEWSOM!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6fc7e634bbf1400db9ac39acc8c8018c&_e=rpi_Ey-SVXWSHhCTTnPNzO6We4uppMXiHswW82T_ofp9jw9dn_NGPtZ07XfpshAcnKZuo9zTASM5l7Zn_BTeeMZlER6kZQ8njnio28z2A30ItcNqaajKTyM8gL3Bzu1BUoKzqtWQfePsBir0IP7QUAY1KUFS3Qn_kJJv5n28mp_7OC6bTtwj8RfoanvTsU04kFgj-c855jlaDu7G5rt5pGrz0SzdxOIHJFmRCBZHTnax6J6xB5uy8lsbg5hhj3qIpQrnyR4B724HdIQEH5-TvcTRQaGaRhH9KVxrdR2L9nSyAniZfFftwqB_lKhhJpk04GM-2U7satykQgM5PBK5yg%3D%3D)
Recalling Newsom will show liberals across the country that we won't stand for a government takeover of our lives, suspensions of our freedoms, destruction of our economy, or their corrupt, elitist hypocrisy while their failed policies destroy our livelihoods.

**A recall of Gavin Newsom is a victory for America, not just California.**

[**Will you help us defeat this failed, liberal governor by chipping in $5, $100 or whatever you can today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6fc7e634bbf1400db9ac39acc8c8018c&_e=rpi_Ey-SVXWSHhCTTnPNzO6We4uppMXiHswW82T_ofp9jw9dn_NGPtZ07XfpshAcnKZuo9zTASM5l7Zn_BTeeMZlER6kZQ8njnio28z2A30ItcNqaajKTyM8gL3Bzu1BJeOUt8K5xSFUA363LjB8XfFf1DC1SJ1rnTuQ29uyW_syHpLDg0AFrdKKdd5FuEPsSG8EF7un9i_95KFdsYpnLAlLIcTneD70Vq1R3zvdXUoLylCK8RJoq-_gSSATvUK4HesuObvsH-nfcBmcifG77iwVn_qx_QuDED7kF49_dyqNk9mTQMA8ck2DjepUk050W9b7popz0B28i78P2WFz9A%3D%3D)

body:
Need Your Help |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ce3d3948c0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

It’s the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, Mark Finchem.

**And I am writing you today with urgent news.**

**_We are only days away from our fundraising deadline, and we need to raise $50,000 – or all of our election audit progress could be in vain._**

Let me tell you why.

**Through your continued support as well as through the support of one of the largest grassroots movements in this century, we have made impressive strides in proving there was fraud in the 2020 election, despite:**

** -A FAILED recall effort against me for fighting for Election Integrity**
** -Media assaults against myself and the movement**
** -Painting Conservatives involved with the audit as insane, liars, or incompetent.**

This is because the Liberals can run all they want, but they can’t hide.

**They can fight back and scratch with their claws, but this is America, and God and Freedom are on our side.**

**_Donate TODAY to keep the Radical Left from stealing more elections for the Democrats!_**

We have found substantial evidence of fraud and we will continue the fight all the way to the Supreme Court if we need to!

**And this is a fire that is spreading. **

[_Donate TODAY to turn this country around. Let’s get back on track and save our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=08648e0316&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5fa46795d5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_Michigan, Georgia, Pennsylvania. They are all looking at following in our footsteps to demonstrate that the 2020 election was STOLEN from Donald Trump._**

But this is just the first battle in a long war against the Radical Left.

**The first step is proving there was fraud.**

**_The second is making sure it can’t happen again. And if we do not hit our URGENT end of month fundraising goal of $50,000 by June 30th, the very office of the Secretary of State – the office that oversees elections – is at stake._**

I have fought from the beginning, spend money out of pocket, and poured my blood, sweat, and tears into this grassroots movements.

**This spark ignited a flame that has spread across the country, and this flame WILL burn away the hiding places of election fraud around the country. It’s already happening.**
**_Imagine what I could do as Secretary of State!_**

If you donate TODAY, and we reach our fundraising goal of $50,000 by the end of the month, 2020 will never happen again and the Democrats will be put in their place.

**And by their place, I of course mean jail. We will make sure that we prosecute to the fullest extent of the law anyone who is found to have perpetrated election fraud.**

name: Giffords.org
subject: We need a big response from the people reading this email, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Our end of quarter fundraising drive ends on Wednesday at midnight. Here’s what you need to know before then:
1\. Our goal before the deadline is to reach 25,000 donations to give us the resources necessary to push the Senate to pass universal background checks.
2\. Right now the NRA is spending millions to reverse decades of gun safety progress and make sure background checks never get a vote in the Senate.
**3\. Our deadline is in two days and we won’t hit our fundraising goal unless we get a big response from people reading this email.**
So we are asking you, friend:
[**Will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 25,000 donation FEC fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21&amount=3&refcode=em210628-2-15?t=1&refcode2=280_3935704_BZS-9S&akid=280%2E3935704%2EBZS-9S)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210628-2-15&t=2&refcode2=280_3935704_BZS-9S&akid=280%2E3935704%2EBZS-9S)**
We have never been this close to passing universal background checks. We have a gun safety majority in Congress and a president in the White House who has vowed to make gun safety a top priority. If we hit our fundraising goal, we will be in a great position to work with them to pass universal background checks and save more lives.
[**So can you chip in to help us make sure that happens?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210628-2-15&t=3&refcode2=280_3935704_BZS-9S&akid=280%2E3935704%2EBZS-9S)
Thank you for joining us in the fight to save lives.
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210628-2-15&t=4&refcode2=280_3935704_BZS-9S&akid=280%2E3935704%2EBZS-9S)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=280%2E3935704%2EBZS-9S) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Did you read Colin's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Did you catch the email from our political director, Colin?

Here's the deal, Peter: The FEC end-of-quarter deadline is in TWO DAYS, and we need help reaching our $5,000 goal. Turning out a strong fundraising report is critical to ensuring we have the resources we need to re-elect Derek next year.

**[Right now we are $1,869 short of our FEC end-of-quarter goal. Read Colin's note to learn more about why it's critical we close the gap, then rush a donation before Wednesday's deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/kUioSJaFoAFg7Z0OR5njs9YEwt9Ml063BgLgiSDDJ5U=/QJRkXbLnNXmBT2oXhxMaKLBNf6s6FI3VpgyIVcSpWY8=?gpsid=50_115_19574&refcode=em21_210628_kkr_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210628_kkr_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Colin McCann
Date: Thu, Jun 24, 2021
Subject: Derek has always fought against corruption and for the people
Hello,

In a minute, I'm going to ask you to **[make a contribution before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/kUioSJaFoAFg7Z0OR5njs9YEwt9Ml063BgLgiSDDJ5U=/QJRkXbLnNXmBT2oXhxMaKLBNf6s6FI3VpgyIVcSpWY8=?gpsid=50_115_19574&refcode=em21_210628_kkr_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210628_kkr_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)** But first, I want to tell you why it's so important.

I know I don't need to explain to you that we cannot take our democracy for granted -- this past year, we all saw that truth first hand. That's why it's so important that we re-elect leaders like Derek, who are committed stewards of our democracy.

As long as he's been in public service: Derek has always fought against corruption and for the people. Right now, he's helping to lead efforts to reform our democracy and make Congress more accountable to the people.

**He 's a true champion, and we cannot risk losing his voice in Congress next year.**

That's where you come in, friend. In less than one week, our campaign to re-elect Derek will reach the FEC end-of-quarter deadline. That means all of our financial reports will become public. If we don't show strong fundraising numbers, you can bet Derek's Republican challengers will take notice.

**[We've set a goal to raise $5,000 before Wednesday's end-of-quarter deadline so that our FEC report shows the strength of this grassroots team. Can Derek count on you to chip in before Wednesday to help us reach this goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/kUioSJaFoAFg7Z0OR5njs9YEwt9Ml063BgLgiSDDJ5U=/QJRkXbLnNXmBT2oXhxMaKLBNf6s6FI3VpgyIVcSpWY8=?gpsid=50_115_19574&refcode=em21_210628_kkr_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210628_kkr_fnd_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Together, we can protect and expand the Democratic House majority so Derek and his colleagues can keep fighting for the people. I hope we can count on your support before Wednesday's deadline.

Thank you,

Colin

Colin McCann
Political Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: What MSNBC just called Pramila
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now more than ever, we need Pramila’s leadership — and we won’t stop growing our movement for real change until we deliver for the people.
#
Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw this.
Over the weekend, Pramila joined Alex Witt on MSNBC to discuss her ongoing fight in Congress to pass a bold infrastructure, jobs, and families plan. She once again made it clear that a smaller bipartisan package won’t pass unless we are at the same time passing a bold reconciliation package that delivers on what the American people want, need, and deserve.
And here’s exactly how Alex Witt reacted:
> **_“There you go: A Congresswoman of conviction, Pramila Jayapal.”_**
Now more than ever, we need Pramila’s leadership — and we won’t stop growing our movement for real change until we deliver for the people. [**But to continue doing that, we must hit our FEC deadline goal of $150,000 at midnight on Wednesday — just two days away. Can you contribute $3 or more right now to support Pramila in this fight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210628?refcode=em20210628-414&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=414_420207_3Lp33k&akid=414%2E420207%2E3Lp33k) _Remember:_ _As a way of saying thank you, Pramila will personally call a few grassroots supporters who help us get over the finish line!_
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210628?refcode=em20210628-414&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=414_420207_3Lp33k&akid=414%2E420207%2E3Lp33k)**
This movement is powered by people — not corporate PACs — giving what they can, not only because of the transformative change we are fighting for with Pramila but also because of the future we want to build in our communities.
We can pass a bold infrastructure, jobs, and families plan, guarantee health care as a human right in this country, and so much more — _but only if we back Pramila up in the fights ahead._ [**Rush in $3 or more before midnight on Wednesday to help us hit our FEC deadline goal so we can continue this necessary work for the people alongside Pramila — who will always lead with conviction.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210628?refcode=em20210628-414&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=414_420207_3Lp33k&akid=414%2E420207%2E3Lp33k)
Thank you,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210628-414-footer&t=22&refcode2=414_420207_3Lp33k&akid=414%2E420207%2E3Lp33k)**

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=3d9b78cea51a4ea2ac3ad59308dd6828&_e=Eu-d3zOoOnIGrvo8R1DM_kqWZ61W7ApUPgA0Okr9Jg_FF_2pTYURwDCrI5PX7xMgGp1jwa-HBculSkwhGV5p10KYKGJ7279hx6x6mMKaNJwCjwlOGLF7-VKNWSyrLI5cp_QUCylP3ZWw2c3dHldV2mGzVV5EilpT_8X6KUDwExwMnRRRboBNmH48os5vNYPgJzMGgv28lWFUCehrJxI089gVum0NX6GxO5jRTmbvO5ayhjPTNp1D2GJ2vREP1Q3qApFZ8PuzEodt69GgPk-NbOThPj-F-eytt-i-3Vt3rdVKBiCez6prykLxBk75-Jn3fg_3RWPN98MQIqQcFxkqvSCa3pwNkTEIbYmp_LCl9e2ljvbYT1Twwu8kUavNIwYBo1p9JcagBkTUHUzILt4w2WWjxVOyeZpWbQ3ANRiVIAZlonw_hFAXB_cXf5pqK4IrTtxi_9Zfo3U1EPoRd8II65FHPmNXaE1wnUOiRDnWTd0%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Nicole Malliotakis is the Democrats' worst nightmare.

Nicole is a staunch conservative, fighting for our freedom every single day in the House of Representatives. **But now, Nicole needs us to fight for her.**
| [**Support Nicole Malliotakis today!**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=3d9b78cea51a4ea2ac3ad59308dd6828&_e=Eu-d3zOoOnIGrvo8R1DM_kqWZ61W7ApUPgA0Okr9Jg_FF_2pTYURwDCrI5PX7xMgGp1jwa-HBculSkwhGV5p10KYKGJ7279hx6x6mMKaNJwCjwlOGLF7-VKNWSyrLI5cp_QUCylP3ZWw2c3dHldV2mGzVV5EilpT_8X6KUDwExwMnRRRboBNmH48os5vNYPgJzMGgv28lWFUCehrJxI089gVum0NX6GxO5jRTmbvO5ayhjPTNp1D2GJ2vREP1Q3qApFZ8PuzEodt69GgPk-NbFFtPEeiWn1vNqRT09EAdEbKAty8koGavhvcU88Pl4OaZibcUzbtT4nGAdgg2EBif9X5EJYY_XnTA2Nt7uqpP26YgAT9gVVPXlTunM5NLWzPWcIIOlEPxsP77suWMct0weZHDl1jeWIFQwxu9mt2kXHfNtoShtSukwvHp1SSVdkATvk8k1vX5rjS-uR34YR8_r0-iY5zppw47fBmTBkZQ_U%3D)
---

Nicole represents New York’s 11th Congressional District, a swing district that has gone back and forth between Democrats and Republicans. **Last cycle, she faced off against an extremely well-funded Democrat opponent who raised MILLIONS against her, but with hard work and the help of conservatives like you, Nicole prevailed!**

And now, Nicole’s district is one of many that we **HAVE TO** keep if we want any chance of Taking Back the House in 2022. Our hopes of unseating Nancy Pelosi and taking the House back for conservatives everywhere starts and ends in Nicole’s district.

Contributions to McGuire for Arizona are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual may contribute up to $5,800 and a couple may contribute up to $11,600. Nonmulticandidate PACs may contribute up to $5,800 and multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $10,000. Contributions from corporations, LLCs taxed as corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals (non-green card holders), and federal contractors are prohibited. clean_body: As one of the most valued members of the American conservative movement, I | Peter, With 3 days until the end of the quarter, when my campaign reports will be made public, we’re setting a goal to gather 10,000 endorsements from American patriots across the country. That's why today I'm asking you - as one of the most valued members of the American conservative movement - The Democrat Machine is dumping millions into Arizona right now, doing the early work needed to protect the Senate seat they picked up last cycle. The truth is Peter, with every passing election, it will become increasingly difficult to flip back this lost Senate seat. That is why we must capitalize on the opportunity now and rally grassroots conservatives across the nation to WIN. Receiving your endorsement today is so important, Peter. you'll show your support for the Republican Party and show the Democrat Machine that we have an army of grassroots conservatives behind my campaign. Thank you, Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire USAF (Ret.) P.S. We just need you to sign your name to show that we have the base support to flip this seat when our quarterly reports are made public. | Maj. Gen. body:
#

[**Friends — we’re respectfully asking you to make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&refcode=em210628-2-15?t=1&refcode2=874_6688874_h4ap9e&akid=874%2E6688874%2Eh4ap9e)
Sorry to be so blunt, but our public June FEC fundraising deadline is on **Wednesday** at midnight and we need a last-minute push to hit our 100,000 contribution goal.
Hitting this goal is so important because this week, One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-aligned Super PAC, just dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking Mark. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.
So in order to counter this avalanche of outside spending, we are going to fight back one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.
**So as Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC and National Republicans swoop in to try and flip this seat, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21&refcode=em210628-2-15?t=2&refcode2=874_6688874_h4ap9e&akid=874%2E6688874%2Eh4ap9e)

$5 at a time. That’s how we are going to overcome the massive amounts of outside spending that is already pouring into this race.

Thank you for being a part of this team!
Team Kelly

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Visiting With General Michael Flynn and 2nd Quarter Deadline
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| When the opportunity to address a room full of patriots presents itself, the answer is "Yes!
This weekend I had the honor of visiting with a man who understands the nature of the battle we're in more than most, General Michael Flynn. I got to tell him all the reasons I am passionate about Washington state and why I am the best candidate to represent the third district. He graciously spent about half an hour visiting with me about the campaign and offering wise counsel and campaign strategy tips.
---
| | |
---|---
|
We talked about the importance of election integrity also. The time to save our republic from the radical left is now, and General Flynn knows this better than almost anyone!

A crucial part of joining me in the fight for our nation is fundraising, and I can't do it without your help! I have a major fundraising goal coming up **this Wednesday at 11:59pm** and I need your contributions.

What an opportunity it was to have General Flynn's undivided attention and advice. I look forward to meeting him again!

I also got to speak to and visit with so many folks fighting for our freedoms in so many ways. Leaders teaching pastors how to speak the truth in spite of their 501C3 designations, mama bears fighting for medical freedom, lovers of our constitution with a passion to help people understand the basics, and so many more. We are not alone, friends. We are surrounded by people who want to see this current culture war defeated and our citizens represented by someone they can relate to.

I can't wait to be that person!
|
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | When the opportunity to address a room full of patriots presents itself, the answer is "Yes! This weekend I had the honor of visiting with a man who understands the nature of the battle we're in more than most, General Michael Flynn. I got to tell him all the reasons I am passionate about Washington state and why I am the best candidate to represent the third district. He graciously spent about half an hour visiting with me about the campaign and offering wise counsel and campaign strategy tips. | | | ---|--- | We talked about the importance of election integrity also. The time to save our republic from the radical left is now, and General Flynn knows this better than almost anyone! A crucial part of joining me in the fight for our nation is fundraising, and I can't do it without your help! I have a major fundraising goal coming up this Wednesday at 11:59pm and I need your contributions. What an opportunity it was to have General Flynn's undivided attention and advice. I look forward to meeting him again! I also got to speak to and visit with so many folks fighting for our freedoms in so many ways. Leaders teaching pastors how to speak the truth in spite of their 501C3 designations, mama bears fighting for medical freedom, lovers of our constitution with a passion to help people understand the basics, and so many more. We are not alone, friends. We are surrounded by people who want to see this current culture war defeated and our citizens represented by someone they can relate to. I can't wait to be that person! | | | | | We're Almost There! Help the campaign reach our second quarter goal. | This is the last week to help the campaign reach our 2nd Quarter goals. Deadline for the quarter is midnight, June 30th! This is part of the fight for the nation, and I can't do it without you! | | | == | | | | == | America's Town Hall I'm answering your questions on the podcast.
