name: Team AOC
subject: Upset
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’ve got a big deadline this week.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210628-2251-header&t=1&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2-2251-P&t=27&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
Exactly three years ago this week, Alexandria and our grassroots movement shocked the nation in an upset that very few people saw coming.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2-2251-P&t=28&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
We brought the courage of our convictions and true grassroots progressive leadership to the halls of Congress...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2-2251-P&t=29&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
We formed a growing squad to flex our collective power and influence legislation in Congress...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2-2251-P&t=30&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
We took care of our community during tough times and raised more than $7 million for mutual aid and disaster relief...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2-2251-P&t=31&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
We couldn’t have done this without you. Thank you for being a part of this movement and making it possible for Alexandria to serve this community and continue speaking truth to power in Congress.
We’re closing the books on our quarterly fundraising report to the FEC. The pundits, politicians, and powerful people who want to see us fail are going to be looking closely at our report. Because, to them, Alexandria’s fundraising numbers are a barometer for the strength of our broader grassroots movement.
**That’s why we’ve set a BIG goal of reaching 106,617 contributions so we can post a huge public number and blow them all away.[Can you chip in $3 now to reach this goal before Wednesday at midnight — our official FEC deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2-2251-P&t=32&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)**
**[Yes! I'll chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2-2251-P&t=51&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)**
Contributing is one of many ways to build our movement — and it’s an important way when we’re up against a big deadline like this week’s.
Whether you phone bank on the weekends, knock doors for a local race near you, or make a donation because of an email like this one... it all adds up. Thank you for all you do. Together, we can continue to grow our movement and deliver real change.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210628-2?refcode=em20210628-2251-P&t=52&refcode2=2251_2526796_bI0Ui3&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=53&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=54&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=55&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=56&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=57&akid=2251%2E2526796%2EbI0Ui3)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:

I’ve spent my life in service to North Carolina, and now, I am running for Senate.

**[I’m usually not this blunt, but our first FEC deadline is just days away, and I need your help to hit my $10,000 goal. Can you split $3 right now to help me do it?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31571794/293091587/-346462335?amount=3&refcode=UD_20210628_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlOTAxNjM3LTg4ZDgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iMSFaJMTTNDD1XTPYw121Rt0JKqP2YAgKfaxOwFQ77E=)** | [_$10,000 GOAL:_ SPLIT $3 TO ELECT CHERI BEASLEY »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/31571795/293091588/-346462335?amount=3&refcode=UD_20210628_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlOTAxNjM3LTg4ZDgtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iMSFaJMTTNDD1XTPYw121Rt0JKqP2YAgKfaxOwFQ77E=)

In my first election, my opponent said I wouldn’t be able to mount a successful candidacy because I was a mom.

**I won that one.**

It’s been said that running to become the third African American woman **_ever_** elected to the U.S. Senate will be too difficult as well.

**And I’ll win this one, too.**
